const now = new Date();\n            let streak = user.streakCount || 0;\n            let lastActive = user.lastActiveTimestamp ? new Date(user.lastActiveTimestamp) : null;\n\n            if (lastActive) {\n                const diffMs = now - lastActive;\n                const diffHours = diffMs / (1000 * 60 * 60);\n\n                if (diffHours >= 24 && diffHours <= 48) {\n                    // Incremented day streak\n                    streak += 1;\n                } else if (diffHours > 48) {\n                    // Reset streak\n                    streak = 1;\n                }\n                // If diffHours < 24, do nothing (streak maintained)\n            } else {\n                streak = 1;\n            }\n\n            // Update user session and Firestore\n      } catch (e) {\n                console.error(\"Error updating user streak:\", e);\n            }\n        },\n\n        renderStreakIndicator: function (streak) {\n            const welcome = window.AuthAPI.isModuleCompleted(userBefore.answers, moduleId) : false;\n\n                const res = originalSubmitAnswer.apply(this, [userId, mId, question, answerText, fileData, compIdx, extra]);\n\n                if (res && res.success) {\n                    // Check if completion status changed\n                    setTimeout(() => {\n                        const userAfter = window.AuthAPI.getCurrentUser();\n                        const isCompleted = userAfter ? window.AuthAPI.isModuleCompleted(userAfter.answers, moduleId) : false;\n                        \n                        if (!wasCompleted && isCompleted) {\n                            self.isMilestoneTriggered = true;\n                            self.triggerMilestoneModal(moduleId);\n                        }\n                    }, 200);\n                }\n                return res;\n            };\n        },\n\n        triggerMilestoneModal: function (moduleId) {\n            const overlay = document.createElement('div');\n            overlay.className = 'milestone-overlay';\n            overlay.innerHTML = `\n                <div class=\"milestone-modal\">\n                    <div class=\"milestone-badge-glow\"></div>\n                    <div class=\"milestone-badge-icon\">🏆</div>\n                    <h2 style=\"font-family: var(--font-serif); font-style: italic; color: var(--accent-gold-light); margin-bottom: 0.8rem; font-size: 1.8rem;\">Module Milestone!</h2>\n                    <p style=\"color: var(--text-primary); font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.5; margin-bottom: 1.8rem;\">\n                        Congratulations! You have successfully completed all lessons and activities for this study module. REAL-TIME PRESENCE BAR\n           ===================================================================== */\n\n        initPresenceDock: function (user, isInstructor) {\n            if (!this.db) return;\n\n            // 1. Setup heartbeat writing\n            const presenceRef = this.db.collection('presence').doc(user.id);\n            const sendHeartbeat = () => {\n                presenceRef.set({\n                    userId: user.id,\n                    name: name,\n                    initials: initials.substring(0, 2),\n                    lastSeen: firebase.firestore.FieldValue.serverTimestamp()\n                }).catch(e => console.error(\"Presence writing error:\", e));\n            };\n\n            // Write initial heartbeat, then run every 60s\n            sendHeartbeat();\n            const heartbeatInterval = setInterval(sendHeartbeat, 60000);\n\n            // Unsubscribe presence on page leave\n            window.addEventListener('beforeunload', () => {\n                clearInterval(heartbeatInterval);\n                presenceRef.delete().catch(e => {});\n            });\n\n            // 3. Listen to active presence within the last 5 minutes\n            this.db.collection('presence')\n                .onSnapshot(snapshot => {\n                    const avatarList = document.getElementById('presenceAvatarsList');\n                    if (!avatarList) return;\n                    avatarList.innerHTML = '';\n\n                    const now = Date.now();\n                    let count = 0;\n\n                    snapshot.forEach(doc => {\n                        const data = doc.data();\n                        \n                        // Local fallback validation since Firestore serverTimestamp might take a second to resolve\n                        let lastSeenMs = now;\n                        if (data.lastSeen) {\n                            lastSeenMs = data.lastSeen.seconds ? data.lastSeen.seconds * 1000 : data.lastSeen;\n                        }\n\n                        // Filter active sessions inside 3 minutes\n                        if (now - lastSeenMs < 180000) {\n                            count++;\n                            if (count <= 6) { // Render max 6 avatar circles\n                                const el = document.createElement('div');\n                                el.className = 'presence-avatar-badge';\n                                el.setAttribute('data-tooltip', data.name);\n                                el.innerText = data.initials;\n                                avatarList.appendChild(el);\n                            }\n                        }\n                    });\n\n                    // If more than 6, render an overflow pill\n                    if (count > 6) {\n                        const extra = document.createElement('div');\n                        extra.className = 'presence-avatar-badge';\n                        extra.style.background = 'rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.4)';\n                        extra.innerText = `+${count - 6}`;\n                        avatarList.appendChild(extra);\n                    }\n                }, err => {\n                    console.error(\"Error reading presence states:\", err);\n                });\n        },\n\n        /* =====================================================================\n           4. drop.classList.remove('active');\n            });\n\n            // Listen to notifications matching user\n            let isFirstLoad = true;\n            this.db.collection('notifications')\n                .where('userId', '==', user.id)\n                .orderBy('timestamp', 'desc')\n                .onSnapshot(snapshot => {\n                    list.innerHTML = '';\n                    let              return;\n                    }\n\n                    snapshot.forEach(doc => {\n                        const data = doc.data();\n                        const id = doc.id;\n                        if (!data.read) unread++;\n\n                        // Build dropdown item\n                        const item = document.createElement('div');\n                        item.className =             <div style=\"font-size: 0.65rem; color: var(--text-secondary); text-align: right; margin-top: 0.3rem;\">\n                                ${data.timestamp ? new Date(data.timestamp.seconds * 1000).toLocaleDateString() : 'Just now'}\n                            </div>\n                        `;\n\n                        item.addEventListener('click', () => {\n                            if (!data.read) {\n                                this.db.collection('notifications').doc(id).update({ read: true });\n                            }\n                        });\n\n                        list.appendChild(item);\n\n                        // Trigger toast notification on new entries (after first load)\n                        if (!isFirstLoad && !data.read) {\n                            this.spawnToast(data.title, data.message);\n                        }\n                    });\n\n                    isFirstLoad = false;\n\n                    if (unread > 0) {\n                        badge.innerText = unread;\n                        badge.style.display = 'flex';\n                    } else {\n                        badge.style.display = 'none';\n                    }\n                });\n\n            // Mark all read trigger\n            markAll.addEventListener('click', async (e) => {\n                e.stopPropagation();\n                try {\n                    const snap = await this.db.collection('notifications')\n                        .where('userId', '==', user.id)\n                        .where('read', '==', false)\n                        .get();\n                    \n                    const batch = this.db.batch();\n                    snap.forEach(doc => {\n                        batch.update(doc.ref, { read: true });\n                    });\n                    await batch.commit();\n                } catch (err) {\n                    console.error(\"Mark all read failed:\", err);\n                }\n            });\n            <div style=\"font-weight: 700; color: var(--accent-gold-light);\">${title}</div>\n                    <div style=\"font-size: 0.8rem; margin-top: 2px;\">${msg}</div>\n                </div>\n            `;\n            container.appendChild(toast);\n\n            // Animate slider\n            setTimeout(() => toast.classList.add('show'), 50);\n\n            // Auto purge after 4 this.flagInactiveApprentices();\n            }, 300);\n        },\n\n        renderInstructorCohortSelector: function () {\n            const table = document.querySelector('.table') || const students = window.AuthAPI.getAllStudents();\n                const cohorts = [...new Set(students.map(s => s.cohort || 'Unassigned'))];\n                cohorts.forEach(c => {\n    }\n\n            select.addEventListener('change', () => {\n                const selected = select.value;\n                const rows = table.querySelectorAll('tbody tr');\n                \n                rows.forEach(row => {\n                    const studentNameLink = row.querySelector('td a');\n                    if (!studentNameLink) return;\n\n                    // Match name with            }\n                });\n            });\n        },\n\n        renderAnalyticsMetrics: function () {\n            // Find placeholder card or append\n            const statsSection =                   });\n\n                    // Sort reflections in memory (descending timestamp)\n                    filtered.sort((a, b) => {\n                        const tA = a.timestamp ?                   });\n\n                    // Sort reflections in memory (descending timestamp)\n                    filtered.sort((a, b) => {\n                        const tA = a.timestamp ? font-size: 1.6rem; color: var(--cmd-gold);\" id=\"modalStudentName\">Student Name</h2>\n                <p style=\"color: var(--cmd-text-muted); font-size: 0.9rem; margin-top: 0.2rem;\">Student Profile, Submissions & Private Messages</p>\n            </div>\n\n            <!-- Modal Sub-Tabs -->\n            <div style=\"display: flex; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--cmd-border); margin-bottom: 1.5rem; gap: 1rem;\">\n                <button id=\"modal-tab-submissions\" class=\"cmd-tab-btn active\" style=\"margin-bottom: -1px;\">Lesson Submissions</button>\n                <button id=\"modal-tab-qa\" class=\"cmd-tab-btn\" style=\"margin-bottom: -1px;\">Lesson Q&A</button>\n                <button id=\"modal-tab-chat\" class=\"cmd-tab-btn\" style=\"margin-bottom: -1px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.4rem;\">Private Messages <span id=\"modal-chat-badge\" style=\"background:#ef4444; color:#fff; display:none; border:none; padding: 0.15rem 0.4rem; font-size:0.65rem; border-radius:10px; line-height:1;\">0</span></button>\n            </div>\n            \n            <div id=\"modal-content-area\" style=\"flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; padding-right: 0.5rem; margin-bottom: 1rem;\">\n                <!-- Content populated dynamically based on active tab -->\n                <div id=\"modalContentSubmissions\">\n                    <div id=\"modalAnswersContainer\" style=\"display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1.5rem; margin-bottom: 2rem;\">\n                        <!-- Populated dynamically -->\n                    </div>\n                </div>\n                <div id=\"modalContentQA\" class=\"hidden\"></div>\n                <div id=\"modalContentChat\" class=\"hidden\"></div>\n            </div>\n        </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- Features background hooks (e.g. Toast Center Container) -->\n    <div id=\"toastCenter\" class=\"toast-container\"></div>\n\n    <script type=\"module\">\n        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', async () => {\n            // Wait for auth.js and Firebase sync to resolve first!\n            if (window.syncPromise) {\n                try {\n                    await window.syncPromise;\n                } catch (err) {\n                    console.warn(\"Firebase sync error in admin.html:\", err);\n                }\n            }\n            if (window.firebaseSyncPromise) {\n                try {\n                    await window.firebaseSyncPromise;\n                } catch (err) {\n                    console.warn(\"Firebase sync error in admin.html:\", err);\n                }\n            }\n\n            try {\n                // 1. Enforce Role Authentication Checks (Student Blockage)\n                if (window.AuthAPI) {\n                    window.AuthAPI.requireAdminAuth();\n                } else {\n                    console.error(\"AuthAPI is missing. Blocking entry.\");\n                    window.location.href = 'admin_login.html';\n                    return;\n                }\n\n                // Restore global showToast hook to use features.js toast UI\n                window.showToast = (msg) => {\n                    if (window.Features && window.Features.spawnToast) {\n                        window.Features.spawnToast(\"Notification\", msg);\n                    } else {\n                        console.log(\"Toast:\", msg);\n                    }\n                };\n\n                // Initialize Command Center Dashboard Telemetry and Handlers\n                initializeAdminTelemetry();\n\n            } catch (err) {\n                console.error(\"Critical Admin Command Center Failure:\", err);\n            }\n        });\n\n        function initializeAdminTelemetry() {\n            const currentAdmin = window.AuthAPI.getCurrentAdmin();\n            const db = firebase.firestore();\n\n            // Executive Profile Details\n            document.getElementById('adminIdCode').innerText = currentAdmin.username.toUpperCase();\n\n            // Live Connection Heartbeat indicator\n            const heartbeatDot = document.getElementById('heartbeatDot');\n            const heartbeatStatus = document.getElementById('heartbeatStatus');\n\n            // Terminate Session Logout Action\n            document.getElementById('btnLogoutAdmin').addEventListener('click', () => {\n                window.AuthAPI.logoutAdmin();\n                window.location.href = 'admin_login.html';\n            });\n\n            // Fetch modules metadata\n            const modsContent = window.AuthAPI.getModulesContent();\n            const modOrder = window.AuthAPI.getModuleOrder().filter(id => modsContent[id]);\n\n            // Populate reflection dropdown\n            const selectEl = document.getElementById('takeawayFilterModule');\n            modOrder.forEach((id, index) => {\n                const opt = document.createElement('option');\n                opt.value = id;\n                opt.innerText = `Module ${index + 1}: ${modsContent[id].title}`;\n                selectEl.appendChild(opt);\n            });\n\n            // Render dynamic module order columns in roster matrix\n            const matrixHeaders = document.getElementById('matrixHeaders');\n            modOrder.forEach((id, index) => {\n                const th = document.createElement('th');\n                th.className = 'matrix-cell';\n                th.innerText = `M${index + 1}`;\n                th.title = modsContent[id].title;\n                matrixHeaders.appendChild(th);\n            });\n\n            // Global Tab controls handling\n            document.querySelectorAll('.cmd-tab-btn').forEach(btn => {\n                btn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {\n                    const targetTab = e.currentTarget.getAttribute('data-tab');\n                    document.querySelectorAll('.cmd-tab-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));\n                    e.currentTarget.classList.add('active');\n\n                    document.querySelectorAll('.cmd-tab-pane').forEach(p => p.style.display = 'none');\n                    document.getElementById(targetTab).style.display = 'block';\n                });\n            });\n\n            // Global modules release switchboard states sync\n            let globalReleasedList = [];\n            db.collection('settings').doc('unlocked_modules').onSnapshot(doc => {\n                try {\n                    const data = doc.data();\n                    globalReleasedList = data && data.list ? data.list : ['module1'];\n                    renderSwitchboard(globalReleasedList);\n                    if (currentStudentsList) {\n                        renderMatrix(currentStudentsList);\n                        renderApprenticesRoster(currentStudentsList);\n                    }\n                } catch (err) {\n                    console.error(\"Error syncing switches:\", err);\n                }\n            }, err => {\n                console.error(\"Unlocked modules sync error:\", err);\n                heartbeatDot.className = 'heartbeat-dot offline';\n                heartbeatStatus.innerText = 'Sync Error';\n            });\n\n            function renderSwitchboard(releasedList) {\n                const listContainer = document.getElementById('switchboardList');\n                listContainer.innerHTML = '';\n\n                modOrder.forEach((id, index) => {\n                    const isReleased = releasedList.includes(id);\n                    const row = document.createElement('div');\n                    row.className = 'switch-row';\n                    row.innerHTML = `\n                        <div>\n                            <div class=\"switch-label\">Module ${index + 1}</div>\n                            <div class=\"switch-sub\">${modsContent[id].title}</div>\n                        </div>\n                        <button class=\"toggle-btn ${isReleased ? 'active' : ''}\" data-id=\"${id}\">\n                            ${isReleased ? 'Released' : 'Locked'}\n                        </button>\n                    `;\n                    listContainer.appendChild(row);\n                });\n            }\n\n            // Global switchboard event listener\n            document.getElementById('switchboardList').addEventListener('click', async (e) => {\n                if (e.target && e.target.classList.contains('toggle-btn')) {\n                    const button = e.target;\n                    const modId = button.getAttribute('data-id');\n                    const isReleased = button.classList.contains('active');\n\n                    button.disabled = true;\n                    button.innerText = 'Syncing...';\n\n                    try {\n                        const newReleased = isReleased \n                            ? globalReleasedList.filter(id => id !== modId) \n                            : [...globalReleasedList, modId];\n                        \n                        // Ensure module1 is always unlocked\n                        if (!newReleased.includes('module1')) {\n                            newReleased.unshift('module1');\n                        }\n\n                        await db.collection('settings').doc('unlocked_modules').set({ list: newReleased });\n                    } catch (err) {\n                        console.error(\"Failed to update module release switch:\", err);\n                    } finally {\n                        button.disabled = false;\n                    }\n                }\n            });\n\n            // Cohort Progress Matrix & Apprentice roster sync\n            let currentStudentsList = null;\n            db.collection('students').onSnapshot(snapshot => {\n                const list = [];\n                snapshot.forEach(doc => list.push({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data() }));\n                currentStudentsList = list;\n                \n                // Update matrix\n                renderMatrix(list);\n                // Update roster tables\n                renderApprenticesRoster(list);\n            }, err => {\n                console.error(\"Students list sync error:\", err);\n            });\n\n            const matrixSearch = document.getElementById('matrixSearch');\n            matrixSearch.addEventListener('input', () => {\n                if (currentStudentsList) renderMatrix(currentStudentsList);\n            });\n\n            function renderMatrix(students) {\n                const filterText = matrixSearch.value.trim().toLowerCase();\n                const body = document.getElementById('matrixBody');\n                body.innerHTML = '';\n\n                const filtered = students.filter(s => {\n                    const fullName = `${s.firstName || ''} ${s.lastName || ''}`.toLowerCase();\n                    return fullName.includes(filterText);\n                });\n\n                if (filtered.length === 0) {\n                    body.innerHTML = `\n                        <tr>\n                            <td colspan=\"${modOrder.length + 1}\" style=\"text-align: center; color: var(--cmd-text-muted); padding: 3rem;\">\n                                No matching apprentice telemetry records found.\n                            </td>\n                        </tr>\n                    `;\n                    return;\n                }\n\n                filtered.forEach(s => {\n                    const tr = document.createElement('tr');\n                    const nameTd = document.createElement('td');\n                    nameTd.style.fontWeight = '600';\n                    nameTd.innerText = `${s.firstName || 'Apprentice'} ${s.lastName || ''}`;\n                    tr.appendChild(nameTd);\n\n                    modOrder.forEach(id => {\n                        const td = document.createElement('td');\n                        td.className = 'matrix-cell';\n                        \n                        const isReleased = globalReleasedList.includes(id);\n                        const isCompleted = window.AuthAPI.isModuleCompleted(s.answers || [], id);\n\n                        let stateClass = 'locked';\n                        let titleTip = 'Locked globally';\n\n                        if (isCompleted) {\n                            stateClass = 'complete';\n                            titleTip = 'Completed by apprentice';\n                        } else if (isReleased) {\n                            stateClass = 'incomplete';\n                            titleTip = 'Available but incomplete';\n                        }\n\n                        td.innerHTML = `<span class=\"matrix-dot ${stateClass}\" title=\"${titleTip}\"></span>`;\n                        tr.appendChild(td);\n                    });\n\n                    body.appendChild(tr);\n                });\n            }\n\n            // Apprentice Roster Render (Pending and Approved Tables)\n            function renderApprenticesRoster(students) {\n                const pendingBody = document.getElementById('pendingTableBody');\n                const studentsBody = document.getElementById('studentsTableBody');\n                const pendingBadge = document.getElementById('pendingBadge');\n                const enrolledBadge = document.getElementById('enrolledBadge');\n\n                const pendingList = students.filter(s => s.status === 'pending');\n                const enrolledList = students.filter(s => s.status === 'approved');\n\n                pendingBadge.innerText = pendingList.length;\n                enrolledBadge.innerText = enrolledList.length;\n\n                // Render Pending\n                pendingBody.innerHTML = '';\n                if (pendingList.length === 0) {\n                    pendingBody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan=\"4\" style=\"text-align: center; color: var(--cmd-text-muted); padding: 2rem;\">No pending registrations.</td></tr>';\n                } else {\n                    pendingList.forEach(student => {\n                        const tr = document.createElement('tr');\n                        const dateFormatted = student.dateAdded ? new Date(student.dateAdded).toLocaleDateString() : 'N/A';\n                        tr.innerHTML = `\n                            <td><strong>${student.firstName} ${student.lastName}</strong></td>\n                            <td style=\"color: var(--cmd-text-muted);\">${student.email}</td>\n                            <td style=\"color: var(--cmd-text-muted);\">${dateFormatted}</td>\n                            <td style=\"text-align: center; display: flex; gap: 0.5rem; justify-content: center; align-items: center; border-bottom: none;\">\n                                <button class=\"cmd-btn\" onclick=\"handleApprove('${student.id}')\" style=\"padding: 0.3rem 0.8rem; font-size: 0.8rem;\">Approve</button>\n                                <button class=\"cmd-btn-secondary\" onclick=\"handleReject('${student.id}')\" style=\"padding: 0.3rem 0.8rem; font-size: 0.8rem; border-color: var(--cmd-danger); color: var(--cmd-danger);\">Reject</button>\n                            </td>\n                        `;\n                        pendingBody.appendChild(tr);\n                    });\n                }\n\n                // Render Enrolled\n                studentsBody.innerHTML = '';\n                if (enrolledList.length === 0) {\n                    studentsBody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan=\"7\" style=\"text-align: center; color: var(--cmd-text-muted); padding: 2rem;\">No enrolled students yet.</td></tr>';\n                } else {\n                    enrolledList.forEach(student => {\n                        const tr = document.createElement('tr');\n                        const progress = student.progress || 0;\n                        const progressHtml = `\n                            <div style=\"display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.8rem;\">\n                                <div style=\"flex: 1; height: 6px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-radius: 3px; overflow: hidden;\">\n                                    <div style=\"width: ${progress}%; height: 100%; background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--cmd-gold), var(--cmd-gold-light)); border-radius: 3px;\"></div>\n                                </div>\n                                <span style=\"font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: bold; color: var(--cmd-gold); min-width: 35px;\">${progress}%</span>\n                            </div>\n                        `;\n\n                        const outreachColHtml = `\n                            <select onchange=\"handleUpdateStudentOutreach('${student.id}', this.value)\" style=\"background: var(--cmd-bg); color: var(--cmd-text-main); border: 1px solid var(--cmd-border); padding: 0.25rem 0.5rem; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.85rem; font-family: var(--font-sans); outline: none;\">\n                                <option value=\"\" ${!student.outreach ? 'selected' : ''}>Unassigned</option>\n                                ${Array.from({length: 19}, (_, i) => i + 1).map(num => `\n                                    <option value=\"${num}\" ${student.outreach === num.toString() ? 'selected' : ''}>Outreach ${num}</option>\n                                `).join('')}\n                            </select>\n                        `;\n\n                        const nameHtml = student.isSitIn \n                            ? `<strong>${student.firstName} ${student.lastName}</strong> <span style=\"font-size: 0.65rem; color: #f59e0b; border: 1px solid rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.4); padding: 0.1rem 0.35rem; border-radius: 10px; background: rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.08); font-weight: normal; margin-left: 0.4rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px;\">Sit-In</span>` \n                            : `<strong>${student.firstName} ${student.lastName}</strong>`;\n\n                        tr.innerHTML = `\n                            <td>${nameHtml}</td>\n                            <td style=\"color: var(--cmd-text-muted); font-size: 0.9rem;\">${student.email}</td>\n                            <td>${outreachColHtml}</td>\n                            <td><span style=\"font-family: monospace; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.07); padding: 0.2rem 0.5rem; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.9rem;\">${student.username}</span></td>\n                            <td><span style=\"font-family: monospace; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.07); padding: 0.2rem 0.5rem; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.9rem;\">${student.password}</span></td>\n                            <td>${progressHtml}</td>\n                            <td style=\"text-align: right;\"><button class=\"cmd-btn-secondary\" onclick=\"viewStudentAnswers('${student.id}')\" style=\"padding: 0.3rem 0.8rem; font-size: 0.8rem;\">Open Portal</button></td>\n                        `;\n                        studentsBody.appendChild(tr);\n                    });\n                }\n            }\n\n            // Add student submit handler\n            const adminAddForm = document.getElementById('adminAddForm');\n            adminAddForm.addEventListener('submit', async (e) => {\n                e.preventDefault();\n                const firstName = document.getElementById('firstName').value.trim();\n                const lastName = document.getElementById('lastName').value.trim();\n                const email = document.getElementById('email').value.trim();\n                const outreach = document.getElementById('outreach').value;\n                const category = document.getElementById('studentCategory').value;\n                const isSitIn = category === 'sitin';\n\n                const regRes = await window.AuthAPI.registerStudent(firstName, lastName, email, outreach, isSitIn);\n                if (regRes.success) {\n                    const approvedStudent = await window.AuthAPI.approveStudent(regRes.student.id);\n                    if (approvedStudent) {\n                        document.getElementById('newUsername').innerText = approvedStudent.username;\n                        document.getElementById('newPassword').innerText = approvedStudent.password;\n                        document.getElementById('credentialsModal').classList.remove('hidden');\n                        adminAddForm.reset();\n                        window.showToast(`Registered & Approved ${firstName}!`);\n                    }\n                } else {\n                    alert(regRes.error || 'Failed to add student.');\n                }\n            });\n\n            // Enrollee approvals & rejections\n            window.handleApprove = async (id) => {\n                const approved = await window.AuthAPI.approveStudent(id);\n                if (approved) {\n                    window.showToast(`Approved student!`);\n                }\n            };\n\n            window.handleReject = async (id) => {\n                const rejected = await window.AuthAPI.rejectStudent(id);\n                if (rejected) {\n                    window.showToast(`Rejected registration!`);\n                }\n            };\n\n            window.handleUpdateStudentOutreach = async (id, outreach) => {\n                const res = await window.AuthAPI.updateStudentOutreach(id, outreach);\n                if (res.success) {\n                    window.showToast(\"Student outreach updated!\");\n                } else {\n                    alert(\"Error: \" + (res.error || \"Failed to update outreach.\"));\n                }\n            };\n\n            // Unified Takeaways Monitor Modal Handling\n            const takeawaysModal = document.getElementById('takeawaysModal');\n            document.getElementById('btnOpenTakeaways').addEventListener('click', () => {\n                takeawaysModal.classList.add('active');\n            });\n            document.getElementById('btnCloseTakeaways').addEventListener('click', () => {\n                takeawaysModal.classList.remove('active');\n            });\n\n            // Reflections collection Firestore listener\n            let currentReflectionsList = [];\n            db.collection('module_reflections').onSnapshot(snapshot => {\n                const list = [];\n                snapshot.forEach(doc => {\n                    list.push(doc.data());\n                });\n                currentReflectionsList = list;\n                renderReflections(list);\n            }, err => {\n                console.error(\"module_reflections sync error:\", err);\n            });\n\n            const takeawaySearchName = document.getElementById('takeawaySearchName');\n            const takeawayFilterModule = document.getElementById('takeawayFilterModule');\n\n            takeawaySearchName.addEventListener('input', () => renderReflections(currentReflectionsList));\n            takeawayFilterModule.addEventListener('change', () => renderReflections(currentReflectionsList));\n\n            function renderReflections(reflections) {\n                const searchName = takeawaySearchName.value.trim().toLowerCase();\n                const moduleFilter = takeawayFilterModule.value;\n                const body = document.getElementById('takeawaysBody');\n                body.innerHTML = '';\n\n                const filtered = reflections.filter(r => {\n                    const nameMatch = (r.studentName || '').toLowerCase().includes(searchName);\n                    const moduleMatch = moduleFilter === 'all' || r.moduleId === moduleFilter;\n                    return nameMatch && moduleMatch;\n                });\n\n                filtered.sort((a, b) => {\n                    const tA = a.timestamp ? (a.timestamp.seconds || 0) : 0;\n                    const tB = b.timestamp ? (b.timestamp.seconds || 0) : 0;\n                    return tB - tA;\n                });\n\n                if (filtered.length === 0) {\n                    body.innerHTML = `\n                        <tr>\n                            <td colspan=\"3\" style=\"text-align: center; color: var(--cmd-text-muted); padding: 3rem;\">\n                                No takeaway submissions match your filter telemetry.\n                            </td>\n                        </tr>\n                    `;\n                    return;\n                }\n\n                filtered.forEach(r => {\n                    const tr = document.createElement('tr');\n                    \n                    const nameTd = document.createElement('td');\n                    nameTd.style.fontWeight = '600';\n                    nameTd.innerText = r.studentName || 'Anonymous';\n                    \n                    const modTd = document.createElement('td');\n                    const modIdx = modOrder.indexOf(r.moduleId);\n                    modTd.innerText = modIdx !== -1 ? `Module ${modIdx + 1}` : (r.moduleId || 'Unknown');\n                    modTd.style.color = 'var(--cmd-gold-light)';\n                    \n                    const contentTd = document.createElement('td');\n                    contentTd.innerText = r.content || '';\n                    contentTd.style.whiteSpace = 'pre-wrap';\n\n                    tr.appendChild(nameTd);\n                    tr.appendChild(modTd);\n                    tr.appendChild(contentTd);\n                    body.appendChild(tr);\n                });\n            }\n\n            // Instructors state sync\n            db.collection('instructors').onSnapshot(snapshot => {\n                const list = [];\n                snapshot.forEach(doc => list.push({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data() }));\n                renderInstructors(list);\n            }, err => {\n                console.error(\"Instructors list sync error:\", err);\n            });\n\n            // Add Instructor submit handler\n            const instructorRegisterForm = document.getElementById('instructorRegisterForm');\n            instructorRegisterForm.addEventListener('submit', async (e) => {\n                e.preventDefault();\n                const name = document.getElementById('newInstructorName').value.trim();\n                const username = document.getElementById('newInstructorUsername').value.trim();\n                const password = document.getElementById('newInstructorPassword').value;\n                const outreach = document.getElementById('newInstructorOutreach').value;\n\n                const res = await window.AuthAPI.addInstructor(name, username, password, outreach);\n                if (res.success) {\n                    instructorRegisterForm.reset();\n                    window.showToast(`Instructor ${name} registered successfully!`);\n                } else {\n                    alert(res.error || 'Failed to add instructor.');\n                }\n            });\n\n            function renderInstructors(list) {\n                const body = <tr>\n                            <td colspan=\"6\" style=\"padding: 2rem; text-align: center; color: var(--cmd-text-muted); font-style: italic;\">\n                                No instructors registered. 'selected' : ''}>Unassigned</option>\n                            ${Array.from({length: 19}, (_, i) => i + 1).map(num => `\n                                <option value=\"${num}\" ${inst.outreach === num.toString() ?        <td style=\"padding: 0.5rem 1rem;\">\n                            <input type=\"text\" value=\"${inst.name}\" onchange=\"handleUpdateInstructorName('${inst.id}', this.value)\" style=\"background: transparent; color: var(--cmd-text-main); border: 1px dashed transparent; border-radius: 4px; padding: 0.25rem 0.5rem; font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 500; font-family: var(--font-sans); width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; outline: none; transition: all 0.2s;\" onfocus=\"this.style.borderColor='var(--cmd-gold)'; this.style.background='var(--cmd-bg)';\" onblur=\"this.style.borderColor='transparent'; this.style.background='transparent';\">\n                        </td>\n                        <td style=\"padding: 0.5rem 1rem;\">\n                            <input type=\"text\" value=\"${inst.username}\" onchange=\"handleUpdateInstructorUsername('${inst.id}', this.value)\" style=\"background: transparent; color: var(--cmd-gold-light); border: 1px dashed transparent; border-radius: 4px; padding: 0.25rem 0.5rem; font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 500; font-family: var(--font-sans); width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; outline: none; transition: all 0.2s;\" onfocus=\"this.style.borderColor='var(--cmd-gold)'; this.style.background='var(--cmd-bg)';\" onblur=\"this.style.borderColor='transparent'; this.style.background='transparent';\">\n                        </td>\n                        <td style=\"padding: 0.5rem 1rem;\">\n                            <input type=\"text\" value=\"${inst.password}\" onchange=\"handleUpdateInstructorPassword('${inst.id}', this.value)\" style=\"background: transparent; color: var(--cmd-text-muted); border: 1px dashed transparent; border-radius: 4px; padding: 0.25rem 0.5rem; font-size: 0.9rem; font-family: monospace; width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; outline: none; transition: all 0.2s;\" onfocus=\"this.style.borderColor='var(--cmd-gold)'; this.style.background='var(--cmd-bg)';\" onblur=\"this.style.borderColor='transparent'; this.style.background='transparent';\">\n                        </td>\n                        <td style=\"padding: 1rem;\">${outreachHtml}</td>\n                        <td style=\"padding: 1rem; color: var(--cmd-text-muted);\">${dateStr}</td>\n                        <td style=\"padding: 1rem;         }\n\n            window.handleUpdateInstructorPassword = async (id, password) => {\n                const trimmed = password.trim();\n                if (!trimmed) {\n                    alert(\"Instructor password cannot be empty.\");\n                    return;\n                }\n                const res = await window.AuthAPI.updateInstructorPassword(id, trimmed);\n                if (res.success) {\n                    window.showToast(\"Instructor password updated!\");\n                } else {\n                    alert(\"Error: \" + (res.error || \"Failed to update instructor password.\"));\n                }\n            };\n\n            window.handleUpdateInstructorOutreach = async (id, outreach) => {\n                const res = await           alert(\"Error: \" + (res.error || \"Failed to update outreach.\"));\n                }\n            };\n\n            window.handleUpdateInstructorName = async (id, name) => {\n                const trimmed = name.trim();\n                if (!trimmed) {\n                    alert(\"Instructor name cannot be empty.\");\n                    return;\n                }\n                const res = await window.AuthAPI.updateInstructorName(id, trimmed);\n                if (res.success) {\n                    window.showToast(\"Instructor name updated!\");\n                } else {\n                    alert(\"Error: \" + (res.error || \"Failed to update name.\"));\n                }\n            };\n\n            window.handleUpdateInstructorUsername = async (id, username) => {\n                const trimmed = username.trim();\n                if (!trimmed) {\n                    alert(\"Instructor username cannot be empty.\");\n                    return;\n                }\n                const res = await window.AuthAPI.updateInstructorUsername(id, trimmed);\n                if (res.success) {\n                    window.showToast(\"Instructor username updated!\");\n                } else {\n                    alert(\"Error: \" + (res.error || \"Failed to update username.\"));\n                }\n            };\n\n            window.handleDeleteInstructor = async (id) => {\n                if (confirm(\"Are you sure you want to delete this instructor account? They will lose access immediately.\")) {\n                    const res = await window.AuthAPI.deleteInstructor(id);\n                    if (res.success) {\n                        window.showToast(\"Instructor account deleted.\");\n                    } else {\n                        alert(res.error || \"Failed to delete instructor.\");\n                    }\n                }\n            };\n\n            // Apprentice Answers Modal implementation & navigation\n            let activeModalStudentId = null;\n            let activeModalTab = 'submissions';\n\n            window.viewStudentAnswers = (id) => {\n                activeModalStudentId = id;\n                const currentAdmin = window.AuthAPI.getCurrentAdmin();\n                const students = window.AuthAPI.getAllStudents();\n                const student = students.find(s => s.id === id);\n                if (student) {\n                    document.getElementById('modalStudentName').innerText = `${student.firstName} ${student.lastName}`;\n                    \n                    const unreadChatCount = (student.chatMessages || []).filter(m => m.senderId === student.id && !m.readByInstructor).length;\n                    const badge = document.getElementById('modal-chat-badge');\n                    if (badge) {\n                        if (unreadChatCount > 0) {\n                            badge.innerText = unreadChatCount;\n                            badge.style.display = 'inline-block';\n                        } else {\n                            badge.style.display = 'none';\n                        }\n                    }\n\n                    const container = document.getElementById('modalAnswersContainer');\n                    container.innerHTML = '';\n                    \n                    const answers = student.answers || [];\n                    if (answers.length === 0) {\n                        container.innerHTML = '<div style=\"text-align:center;color:var(--cmd-text-muted);padding:2rem;\">No submissions found for this student.</div>';\n                    } else {\n                        const grouped = {};\n                        answers.forEach(ans => {\n                            if (!grouped[ans.moduleId]) {\n                                grouped[ans.moduleId] = [];\n                            }\n                            grouped[ans.moduleId].push(ans);\n                        });\n                        \n                        Object.keys(grouped).forEach(modId => {\n                            const modIdx = modOrder.indexOf(modId) + 1;\n                            const modNum = modIdx > 0 ? `Module ${modIdx}: ` : '';\n                            const mod = modsContent[modId] || { title: 'Unknown Module', subtitle: '' };\n                            \n                            const modSection = document.createElement('div');\n                            modSection.style.border = '1.5px solid var(--cmd-border)';\n                            modSection.style.borderRadius = '12px';\n                            modSection.style.padding = '1.5rem';\n                            modSection.style.background = 'var(--cmd-bg)';\n                            modSection.style.marginBottom = '1.5rem';\n                            \n                            const header = document.createElement('div');\n                            header.style.borderBottom = '1px solid var(--cmd-border)';\n                            header.style.paddingBottom = '0.6rem';\n                            header.style.marginBottom = '1rem';\n                            header.innerHTML = `\n                                <h4 style=\"margin: 0; font-size: 1.15rem; color: var(--cmd-gold-light); font-family: var(--font-sans); text-align: left;\">${modNum}${mod.title}</h4>\n                            `;\n                            modSection.appendChild(header);\n                            \n                            const itemsContainer = document.createElement('div');\n                            itemsContainer.style.display = 'flex';\n                            itemsContainer.style.flexDirection = 'column';\n                            itemsContainer.style.gap = '1.2rem';\n                            \n                            grouped[modId].forEach((ans) => {\n                                const card = document.createElement('div');\n                                card.style.background = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.03)';\n                                card.style.padding = '1.2rem';\n                                card.style.borderRadius = '8px';\n                                card.style.border = '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05)';\n                                \n                                let typeLabel = ans.type ? ans.type.replace('_', ' ').toUpperCase() : 'REFLECTION';\n                                let contentHtml = '';\n                                let gradeHtml = '';\n                                let remarkFormHtml = '';\n                                \n                                if (ans.answer) {\n                                    contentHtml = `<p style=\"margin: 0.5rem 0; color: var(--cmd-text-main); line-height: 1.5; font-size: 0.92rem; text-align: left;\"><strong>Response:</strong> <span style=\"font-style: italic; color: var(--cmd-text-main);\">\"${ans.answer}\"</span></p>`;\n                                } else if (ans.file) {\n                                    let previewHtml = '';\n                                    if (ans.file.url) {\n                                        const ext = ans.file.name.split('.').pop().toLowerCase();\n                                        const isImg = ['png', 'jpg', 'jpeg', 'gif', 'webp'].includes(ext);\n                                        const isVid = ['mp4', 'webm', 'mov'].includes(ext);\n                                        if (isImg) {\n                                            previewHtml = `<div style=\"margin-top:0.5rem;\"><img src=\"${ans.file.url}\" style=\"max-height: 180px; max-width: 100%; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid var(--cmd-border); object-fit: contain;\"></div>`;\n                                        } else if (isVid) {\n                                            previewHtml = `<div style=\"margin-top:0.5rem;\"><video src=\"${ans.file.url}\" controls style=\"max-height: 200px; max-width: 100%; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid var(--cmd-border); background:#000;\"></video></div>`;\n                                        }\n                                    }\n                                    contentHtml = `\n                                        <div style=\"margin: 0.5rem 0; font-size: 0.92rem; color: var(--cmd-text-main); text-align: left;\">\n                                            <strong>Attached File:</strong> <span style=\"font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--cmd-gold-light);\">${ans.file.name} (${ans.file.size})</span>\n                                            ${previewHtml}\n                                        </div>\n                                    `;\n                                }\n                                \n                                if (ans.score !== null) {\n                                    gradeHtml = `\n                                        <div style=\"font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: bold; color: ${ans.isCorrect ? 'var(--cmd-mint)' : 'var(--cmd-danger)'}; margin-top: 0.4rem; text-align: left;\">\n                                            Auto-Graded Result: ${ans.score} / ${ans.maxScore} (${ans.isCorrect ? 'CORRECT' : 'INCORRECT'})\n                                        </div>\n                                    `;\n                                }\n                                \n                                if (ans.type === 'reflection' || ans.type === 'essay' || ans.type === 'file_upload' || !ans.type) {\n                                    const currentRemark = ans.teacherRemarks || '';\n                                    remarkFormHtml = `\n                                        <div style=\"margin-top: 1rem; border-top: 1px dashed rgba(255,255,255,0.08); padding-top: 1rem; text-align: left;\">\n                                            <label style=\"display: block; font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--cmd-gold-light); font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0.4rem;\">INSTRUCTOR REMARKS / COMMENTS</label>\n                                            <div style=\"display: flex; gap: 0.6rem;\">\n                                                <textarea id=\"remark_input_${ans.moduleId}_${ans.componentIndex !== null ? ans.componentIndex : ''}\" class=\"cmd-input\" rows=\"2\" placeholder=\"Type your remarks here...\">${currentRemark}</textarea>\n                                                <button class=\"cmd-btn\" style=\"font-size: 0.85rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem;\" onclick=\"saveRemarks('${id}', '${ans.moduleId}', ${ans.componentIndex !== null ? ans.componentIndex : 'null'})\">Save</button>\n                                            </div>\n                                            ${ans.teacherRemarksDate ? `<span style=\"font-size: 0.72rem; color: var(--cmd-text-muted); margin-top: 0.4rem; display: block;\">Last comment saved on ${new Date(ans.teacherRemarksDate).toLocaleString()} by ${ans.teacherRemarksAdmin || 'Admin'}</span>` : ''}\n                                        </div>\n                                    `;\n                                }\n                                \n                                card.innerHTML = `\n                                    <div style=\"display: flex; features.js toast UI\n                window.showToast = (msg) => {\n                    if (window.Features && window.Features.spawnToast) {\n                        window.Features.spawnToast(\"Notification\", msg);\n                    } else {\n                        console.log(\"Toast:\", msg);\n                    }\n                };\n\n                // let activeEditable = null;\n\n        document.addEventListener('selectionchange', () => {\n            const sel = window.getSelection();\n            if (sel.rangeCount > 0) {\n                const range = sel.getRangeAt(0);\n                let node = range.commonAncestorContainer;\n                if (node.nodeType !== 1) {\n                    node = node.parentNode;\n                }\n                const editable = node ? node.closest('[contenteditable=\"true\"]') : null;\n                if (editable) {\n                    savedRange = range.cloneRange();\n                    activeEditable = editable;\n                }\n            }\n        });\n\n        function applySpanStyle(styleName, styleValue) {\n            const sel = window.getSelection();\n            if (!sel.rangeCount) return;\n            const range = sel.getRangeAt(0);\n            \n            const span = document.createElement('span');\n            span.style[styleName] = styleValue;\n            \n            try {\n                if (range.collapsed) {\n                    span.innerHTML = '&#8203;'; // Zero-width space to hold cursor inside\n                    range.insertNode(span);\n                    range.setStart(span.firstChild, 1);\n                    range.setEnd(span.firstChild, 1);\n                } else {\n                    range.surroundContents(span);\n                }\n            } catch (e) {\n                const content = range.extractContents();\n                span.appendChild(content);\n                range.insertNode(span);\n            }\n            \n            sel.removeAllRanges();\n            const newRange = document.createRange();\n            if (span.firstChild) {\n                newRange.selectNodeContents(span);\n            } else {\n                newRange.selectNode(span);\n            }\n            sel.addRange(newRange);\n        }\n\n        window.formatFieldText = (blockIndex, fieldName, type, value) => {\n            let selector = \"\";\n            if (fieldName === 'content') {\n                selector = `.block-content-textarea[data-index=\"${blockIndex}\"]`;\n            } else {\n                selector = `.block-field-input[data-index=\"${blockIndex}\"][data-field=\"${fieldName}\"]`;\n            }\n            const targetElement = document.querySelector(selector);\n            if (!targetElement) return;\n\n            const isContentEditable = targetElement.tagName === 'DIV' && targetElement.contentEditable === 'true';\n\n            if (isContentEditable) {\n                if (activeEditable === targetElement && savedRange) {\n                    const sel = window.getSelection();\n                    sel.removeAllRanges();\n                    sel.addRange(savedRange);\n                } else {\n                    targetElement.focus();\n                }\n\n                if (type === 'bold') {\n                    document.execCommand('bold', false, null);\n                } else if (type === 'italic') {\n                    document.execCommand('italic', false, null);\n                } else if (type === 'underline') {\n                    document.execCommand('underline', false, null);\n                } else if (type === 'size') {\n                    applySpanStyle('fontSize', value);\n                } else if (type === 'color') {\n                    applySpanStyle('color', value);\n                } else if (type === 'highlight') {\n                    applySpanStyle('backgroundColor', value);\n                }\n\n                // Update range after styling\n                const sel = window.getSelection();\n                if (sel.rangeCount > 0) {\n                    savedRange = sel.getRangeAt(0).cloneRange();\n                }\n\n                if (typeof window.syncTextareasGlobal === 'function') {\n                    window.syncTextareasGlobal();\n                }\n            } else {\n                // Fallback for standard text inputs (if any)\n                const start = targetElement.selectionStart;\n                const end = targetElement.selectionEnd;\n                const text = targetElement.value;\n                const selectedText = text.substring(start, end);\n\n                let replacement = \"\";\n                if (type === 'bold') {\n                    replacement = `<strong>${selectedText}</strong>`;\n                } else if (type === 'italic') {\n                    replacement = `<em>${selectedText}</em>`;\n                } else if (type === 'underline') {\n                    replacement = `<u>${selectedText}</u>`;\n                } else if (type === 'size') {\n                    replacement = `<span style=\"font-size: ${value};\">${selectedText}</span>`;\n                } else if (type === 'color') {\n                    replacement = `<span style=\"color: ${value};\">${selectedText}</span>`;\n                } else if (type === 'highlight') {\n                    replacement = `<span style=\"background-color: ${value};\">${selectedText}</span>`;\n                }\n\n                targetElement.value = text.substring(0, start) + replacement + text.substring(end);\n                targetElement.focus();\n                targetElement.selectionStart = start;\n                targetElement.selectionEnd = start + replacement.length;\n\n                if (typeof window.syncTextareasGlobal === 'function') {\n                    window.syncTextareasGlobal();\n                }\n            }\n        };\n\n        function initializeAdminTelemetry() {\n            const currentAdmin = window.AuthAPI.getCurrentAdmin();\n            const db = firebase.firestore();\n\n            // Executive Profile Details\n            document.getElementById('adminIdCode').innerText = currentAdmin.username.toUpperCase();\n\n            // Live Connection Heartbeat indicator\n            const heartbeatDot = document.getElementById('heartbeatDot');\n            const heartbeatStatus = document.getElementById('heartbeatStatus');\n\n            // Terminate Session Logout Action\n            document.getElementById('btnLogoutAdmin').addEventListener('click', () => {\n                window.AuthAPI.logoutAdmin();\n                window.location.href = 'admin_login.html';\n            });\n\n            // Fetch modules metadata\n            const modsContent = window.AuthAPI.getModulesContent();\n            const modOrder = window.AuthAPI.getModuleOrder().filter(id => modsContent[id]);\n\n            // Populate reflection dropdown\n            const selectEl = document.getElementById('takeawayFilterModule');\n            modOrder.forEach((id, index) => {\n                const opt = document.createElement('option');\n                opt.value = id;\n                opt.innerText = `Module ${index + 1}: ${modsContent[id].title}`;\n                selectEl.appendChild(opt);\n            });\n\n            // Render dynamic module order columns in roster matrix\n            const matrixHeaders = document.getElementById('matrixHeaders');\n            modOrder.forEach((id, index) => {\n                const th = document.createElement('th');\n                th.className = 'matrix-cell';\n                th.innerText = `M${index + 1}`;\n                th.title = modsContent[id].title;\n                matrixHeaders.appendChild(th);\n            });\n\n            // Global Tab controls handling\n            document.querySelectorAll('.cmd-tab-btn').forEach(btn => {\n                btn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {\n                    const targetTab = e.currentTarget.getAttribute('data-tab');\n                    document.querySelectorAll('.cmd-tab-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));\n                    e.currentTarget.classList.add('active');\n\n                    document.querySelectorAll('.cmd-tab-pane').forEach(p => p.style.display = 'none');\n                    document.getElementById(targetTab).style.display = 'block';\n                });\n            });\n\n            // Global modules release switchboard states sync\n            let globalReleasedList = [];\n            db.collection('settings').doc('unlocked_modules').onSnapshot(doc => {\n                try {\n                    const data = doc.data();\n                    globalReleasedList = data && data.list ? data.list : ['module1'];\n                    renderSwitchboard(globalReleasedList);\n                    if (currentStudentsList) {\n                        renderMatrix(currentStudentsList);\n                        renderApprenticesRoster(currentStudentsList);\n                    }\n                } catch (err) {\n                    console.error(\"Error syncing switches:\", err);\n                }\n            }, err => {\n                console.error(\"Unlocked modules sync error:\", err);\n                heartbeatDot.className = 'heartbeat-dot offline';\n                heartbeatStatus.innerText = 'Sync Error';\n            });\n\n            function renderSwitchboard(releasedList) {\n                const listContainer = document.getElementById('switchboardList');\n                listContainer.innerHTML = '';\n\n                modOrder.forEach((id, index) => {\n                    const isReleased = releasedList.includes(id);\n                    const row = document.createElement('div');\n                    row.className = 'switch-row';\n                    row.innerHTML = `\n                        <div>\n                            <div class=\"switch-label\">Module ${index + 1}</div>\n                            <div class=\"switch-sub\">${modsContent[id].title}</div>\n                        </div>\n                        <button class=\"toggle-btn ${isReleased ? 'active' : ''}\" data-id=\"${id}\">\n                            ${isReleased ? 'Released' : 'Locked'}\n                        </button>\n                    `;\n                    listContainer.appendChild(row);\n                });\n            }\n\n            // Global switchboard event listener\n            document.getElementById('switchboardList').addEventListener('click', async (e) => {\n                if (e.target && e.target.classList.contains('toggle-btn')) {\n                    const button = e.target;\n                    const modId = button.getAttribute('data-id');\n                    const isReleased = button.classList.contains('active');\n\n                    button.disabled = true;\n                    button.innerText = 'Syncing...';\n\n                    try {\n                        const newReleased = isReleased \n                            ? globalReleasedList.filter(id => id !== modId) \n                            : [...globalReleasedList, modId];\n                        \n                        // Ensure module1 is always unlocked\n                        if (!newReleased.includes('module1')) {\n                            newReleased.unshift('module1');\n                        }\n\n                        await db.collection('settings').doc('unlocked_modules').set({ list: newReleased });\n                    } catch (err) {\n                        console.error(\"Failed to update module release switch:\", err);\n                    } finally {\n                        button.disabled = false;\n                    }\n                }\n            });\n\n            // Cohort Progress Matrix & Apprentice roster sync\n            let currentStudentsList = null;\n            db.collection('students').onSnapshot(snapshot => {\n                const list = [];\n                snapshot.forEach(doc => list.push({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data() }));\n                currentStudentsList = list;\n                \n                // Update matrix\n                renderMatrix(list);\n                // Update roster tables\n                renderApprenticesRoster(list);\n            }, err => {\n                console.error(\"Students list sync error:\", err);\n            });\n\n            const matrixSearch = document.getElementById('matrixSearch');\n            matrixSearch.addEventListener('input', () => {\n                if (currentStudentsList) renderMatrix(currentStudentsList);\n            });\n\n            function renderMatrix(students) {\n                const filterText = matrixSearch.value.trim().toLowerCase();\n                const body = document.getElementById('matrixBody');\n                body.innerHTML = '';\n\n                const filtered = students.filter(s => {\n                    const fullName = `${s.firstName || ''} ${s.lastName || ''}`.toLowerCase();\n                    return fullName.includes(filterText);\n                });\n\n                if (filtered.length === 0) {\n                    body.innerHTML = `\n                        <tr>\n                            <td colspan=\"${modOrder.length + 1}\" style=\"text-align: center; color: var(--cmd-text-muted); padding: 3rem;\">\n                                No matching apprentice telemetry records found.\n                            </td>\n                        </tr>\n                    `;\n                    return;\n                }\n\n                filtered.forEach(s => {\n                    const tr = document.createElement('tr');\n                    const nameTd = document.createElement('td');\n                    nameTd.style.fontWeight = '600';\n                    nameTd.innerText = `${s.firstName || 'Apprentice'} ${s.lastName || ''}`;\n                    tr.appendChild(nameTd);\n\n                    modOrder.forEach(id => {\n                        const td = document.createElement('td');\n                        td.className = 'matrix-cell';\n                        \n                        const isReleased = globalReleasedList.includes(id);\n                        const isCompleted = window.AuthAPI.isModuleCompleted(s.answers || [], id);\n\n                        let stateClass = 'locked';\n                        let titleTip = 'Locked globally';\n\n                        if (isCompleted) {\n                            stateClass = 'complete';\n                            titleTip = 'Completed by apprentice';\n                        } else if (isReleased) {\n                            stateClass = 'incomplete';\n                            titleTip = 'Available but incomplete';\n                        }\n\n                        td.innerHTML = `<span class=\"matrix-dot ${stateClass}\" title=\"${titleTip}\"></span>`;\n                        tr.appendChild(td);\n                    });\n\n                    body.appendChild(tr);\n                });\n            }\n\n            // Apprentice Roster Render (Pending and Approved Tables)\n            function renderApprenticesRoster(students) {\n                const pendingBody = document.getElementById('pendingTableBody');\n                const studentsBody = document.getElementById('studentsTableBody');\n                const pendingBadge = document.getElementById('pendingBadge');\n                const enrolledBadge = document.getElementById('enrolledBadge');\n\n                const pendingList = students.filter(s => s.status === 'pending');\n                const enrolledList = students.filter(s => s.status === 'approved');\n\n                pendingBadge.innerText = pendingList.length;\n                enrolledBadge.innerText = enrolledList.length;\n\n                // Render Pending\n                pendingBody.innerHTML = '';\n                if (pendingList.length === 0) {\n                    pendingBody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan=\"4\" style=\"text-align: center; color: var(--cmd-text-muted); padding: 2rem;\">No pending registrations.</td></tr>';\n                } else {\n                    pendingList.forEach(student => {\n                        const tr = document.createElement('tr');\n                        const dateFormatted = student.dateAdded ? new Date(student.dateAdded).toLocaleDateString() : 'N/A';\n                        tr.innerHTML = `\n                            <td><strong>${student.firstName} ${student.lastName}</strong></td>\n                            <td style=\"color: var(--cmd-text-muted);\">${student.email}</td>\n                            <td style=\"color: var(--cmd-text-muted);\">${dateFormatted}</td>\n                            <td style=\"text-align: center; display: flex; gap: 0.5rem; justify-content: center; align-items: center; border-bottom: none;\">\n                                <button class=\"cmd-btn\" onclick=\"handleApprove('${student.id}')\" style=\"padding: 0.3rem 0.8rem; font-size: 0.8rem;\">Approve</button>\n                                <button class=\"cmd-btn-secondary\" onclick=\"handleReject('${student.id}')\" style=\"padding: 0.3rem 0.8rem; font-size: 0.8rem; border-color: var(--cmd-danger); color: var(--cmd-danger);\">Reject</button>\n                            </td>\n                        `;\n                        pendingBody.appendChild(tr);\n                    });\n                }\n\n                // Render Enrolled\n                studentsBody.innerHTML = '';\n                if (enrolledList.length === 0) {\n                    studentsBody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan=\"7\" style=\"text-align: center; color: var(--cmd-text-muted); padding: 2rem;\">No enrolled students yet.</td></tr>';\n                } else {\n                    enrolledList.forEach(student => {\n                        const tr = document.createElement('tr');\n                        const progress = student.progress || 0;\n                        const progressHtml = `\n                            <div style=\"display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.8rem;\">\n                                <div style=\"flex: 1; height: 6px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-radius: 3px; overflow: hidden;\">\n                                    <div style=\"width: ${progress}%; height: 100%; background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--cmd-gold), var(--cmd-gold-light)); border-radius: 3px;\"></div>\n                                </div>\n                                <span style=\"font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: bold; color: var(--cmd-gold); min-width: 35px;\">${progress}%</span>\n                            </div>\n                        `;\n\n                        const outreachColHtml = `\n                            <select onchange=\"handleUpdateStudentOutreach('${student.id}', this.value)\" style=\"background: var(--cmd-bg); color: var(--cmd-text-main); border: 1px solid var(--cmd-border); padding: 0.25rem 0.5rem; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.85rem; font-family: var(--font-sans); outline: none;\">\n                                <option value=\"\" ${!student.outreach ? 'selected' : ''}>Unassigned</option>\n                                ${Array.from({length: 19}, (_, i) => i + 1).map(num => `\n                                    <option value=\"${num}\" ${student.outreach === num.toString() ? 'selected' : ''}>Outreach ${num}</option>\n                                `).join('')}\n                            </select>\n                        `;\n\n                        const nameHtml = student.isSitIn \n                            ? `<strong>${student.firstName} ${student.lastName}</strong> <span style=\"font-size: 0.65rem; color: #f59e0b; border: 1px solid rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.4); padding: 0.1rem 0.35rem; border-radius: 10px; background: rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.08); font-weight: normal; margin-left: 0.4rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px;\">Sit-In</span>` \n                            : `<strong>${student.firstName} ${student.lastName}</strong>`;\n\n                        tr.innerHTML = `\n                            <td>${nameHtml}</td>\n                            <td style=\"color: var(--cmd-text-muted); font-size: 0.9rem;\">${student.email}</td>\n                            <td>${outreachColHtml}</td>\n                            <td><span style=\"font-family: monospace; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.07); padding: 0.2rem 0.5rem; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.9rem;\">${student.username}</span></td>\n                            <td><span style=\"font-family: monospace; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.07); padding: 0.2rem 0.5rem; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.9rem;\">${student.password}</span></td>\n                            <td>${progressHtml}</td>\n                            <td style=\"text-align: right;\"><button class=\"cmd-btn-secondary\" onclick=\"viewStudentAnswers('${student.id}')\" style=\"padding: 0.3rem 0.8rem; font-size: 0.8rem;\">Open Portal</button></td>\n                        `;\n                        studentsBody.appendChild(tr);\n                    });\n                }\n            }\n\n            // Add student submit handler\n            const adminAddForm = document.getElementById('adminAddForm');\n            adminAddForm.addEventListener('submit', async (e) => {\n                e.preventDefault();\n                const firstName = document.getElementById('firstName').value.trim();\n                const lastName = document.getElementById('lastName').value.trim();\n                const email = document.getElementById('email').value.trim();\n                const outreach = document.getElementById('outreach').value;\n                const category = document.getElementById('studentCategory').value;\n                const isSitIn = category === 'sitin';\n\n                const regRes = await window.AuthAPI.registerStudent(firstName, lastName, email, outreach, isSitIn);\n                if (regRes.success) {\n                    const approvedStudent = await window.AuthAPI.approveStudent(regRes.student.id);\n                    if (approvedStudent) {\n                        document.getElementById('newUsername').innerText = approvedStudent.username;\n                        document.getElementById('newPassword').innerText = approvedStudent.password;\n                        document.getElementById('credentialsModal').classList.remove('hidden');\n                        adminAddForm.reset();\n                        window.showToast(`Registered & Approved ${firstName}!`);\n                    }\n                } else {\n                    alert(regRes.error || 'Failed to add student.');\n                }\n            });\n\n            // Enrollee approvals & rejections\n            window.handleApprove = async (id) => {\n                const approved = await window.AuthAPI.approveStudent(id);\n                if (approved) {\n                    window.showToast(`Approved student!`);\n                }\n            };\n\n            window.handleReject = async (id) => {\n                const rejected = await window.AuthAPI.rejectStudent(id);\n                if (rejected) {\n                    window.showToast(`Rejected registration!`);\n                }\n            };\n\n            window.handleUpdateStudentOutreach = async (id, outreach) => {\n                const res = await window.AuthAPI.updateStudentOutreach(id, outreach);\n                if (res.success) {\n                    window.showToast(\"Student outreach updated!\");\n                } else {\n                    alert(\"Error: \" + (res.error || \"Failed to update outreach.\"));\n                }\n            };\n\n            // Unified Takeaways Monitor Modal Handling\n            const takeawaysModal = document.getElementById('takeawaysModal');\n            document.getElementById('btnOpenTakeaways').addEventListener('click', () => {\n                takeawaysModal.classList.add('active');\n            });\n            document.getElementById('btnCloseTakeaways').addEventListener('click', () => {\n                takeawaysModal.classList.remove('active');\n            });\n\n            // Reflections collection Firestore listener\n            let currentReflectionsList = [];\n            db.collection('module_reflections').onSnapshot(snapshot => {\n                const list = [];\n                snapshot.forEach(doc => {\n                    list.push(doc.data());\n                });\n                currentReflectionsList = list;\n                renderReflections(list);\n            }, err => {\n                console.error(\"module_reflections sync error:\", err);\n            });\n\n            const takeawaySearchName = document.getElementById('takeawaySearchName');\n            const takeawayFilterModule = document.getElementById('takeawayFilterModule');\n\n            takeawaySearchName.addEventListener('input', () => renderReflections(currentReflectionsList));\n            takeawayFilterModule.addEventListener('change', () => renderReflections(currentReflectionsList));\n\n            function renderReflections(reflections) {\n                const searchName = takeawaySearchName.value.trim().toLowerCase();\n                const moduleFilter = takeawayFilterModule.value;\n                const body = document.getElementById('takeawaysBody');\n                body.innerHTML = '';\n\n                const filtered = reflections.filter(r => {\n                    const nameMatch = (r.studentName || '').toLowerCase().includes(searchName);\n                    const moduleMatch = moduleFilter === 'all' || r.moduleId === moduleFilter;\n                    return nameMatch && moduleMatch;\n                });\n\n                filtered.sort((a, b) => {\n                    const tA = a.timestamp ? (a.timestamp.seconds || 0) : 0;\n                    const tB = b.timestamp ? (b.timestamp.seconds || 0) : 0;\n                    return tB - tA;\n                });\n\n                if (filtered.length === 0) {\n                    body.innerHTML = `\n                        <tr>\n                            <td colspan=\"3\" style=\"text-align: center; color: var(--cmd-text-muted); padding: 3rem;\">\n                                No takeaway submissions match your filter telemetry.\n                            </td>\n                        </tr>\n                    `;\n                    return;\n                }\n\n                filtered.forEach(r => {\n                    const tr = document.createElement('tr');\n                    \n                    const nameTd = document.createElement('td');\n                    nameTd.style.fontWeight = '600';\n                    nameTd.innerText = r.studentName || 'Anonymous';\n                    \n                    const modTd = document.createElement('td');\n                    const modIdx = modOrder.indexOf(r.moduleId);\n                    modTd.innerText = modIdx !== -1 ? `Module ${modIdx + 1}` : (r.moduleId || 'Unknown');\n                    modTd.style.color = 'var(--cmd-gold-light)';\n                    \n                    const contentTd = document.createElement('td');\n                    contentTd.innerText = r.content || '';\n                    contentTd.style.whiteSpace = 'pre-wrap';\n\n                    tr.appendChild(nameTd);\n                    tr.appendChild(modTd);\n                    tr.appendChild(contentTd);\n                    body.appendChild(tr);\n                });\n            }\n\n            // Instructors state sync\n            db.collection('instructors').onSnapshot(snapshot => {\n                const list =
