[];\n                snapshot.forEach(doc => list.push({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data() }));\n                renderInstructors(list);\n            }, err => {\n                console.error(\"Instructors list sync error:\", err);\n            });\n\n            // Add Instructor submit handler\n            const instructorRegisterForm = document.getElementById('instructorRegisterForm');\n            instructorRegisterForm.addEventListener('submit', async (e) => {\n                e.preventDefault();\n                const name = document.getElementById('newInstructorName').value.trim();\n                const username = document.getElementById('newInstructorUsername').value.trim();\n                const password = document.getElementById('newInstructorPassword').value;\n                const outreach = document.getElementById('newInstructorOutreach').value;\n\n                const res = await window.AuthAPI.addInstructor(name, username, password, outreach);\n                if (res.success) {\n                    instructorRegisterForm.reset();\n                    window.showToast(`Instructor ${name} registered successfully!`);\n                } else {\n                    alert(res.error || 'Failed to add instructor.');\n                }\n            });\n\n            function renderInstructors(list) {\n                const body = document.getElementById('instructorsTableBody');\n                body.innerHTML = '';\n\n                if (list.length === 0) {\n                    body.innerHTML = `\n                        <tr>\n                            <td colspan=\"6\" style=\"padding: 2rem; text-align: center; color: var(--cmd-text-muted); font-style: italic;\">\n                                No instructors registered. Use the panel above to add one.\n                            </td>\n                        </tr>\n                    `;\n                    return;\n                }\n\n                list.forEach(inst => {\n                    const tr = document.createElement('tr');\n                    const dateStr = inst.dateAdded ? new Date(inst.dateAdded).toLocaleDateString() : 'N/A';\n                    \n                    const outreachHtml = `\n                        <select onchange=\"handleUpdateInstructorOutreach('${inst.id}', this.value)\" style=\"background: var(--cmd-bg); color: var(--cmd-text-main); border: 1px solid var(--cmd-border); padding: 0.25rem 0.5rem; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.85rem; font-family: var(--font-sans); outline: none;\">\n                            <option value=\"\" ${!inst.outreach ? 'selected' : ''}>Unassigned</option>\n                            ${Array.from({length: 19}, (_, i) => i + 1).map(num => `\n                                <option value=\"${num}\" ${inst.outreach === num.toString() ? 'selected' : ''}>Outreach ${num}</option>\n                            `).join('')}\n                        </select>\n                    `;\n\n                    tr.innerHTML = `\n                        <td style=\"padding: 0.5rem 1rem;\">\n                            <input type=\"text\" value=\"${inst.name}\" onchange=\"handleUpdateInstructorName('${inst.id}', this.value)\" style=\"background: transparent; color: var(--cmd-text-main); border: 1px dashed transparent; border-radius: 4px; padding: 0.25rem 0.5rem; font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 500; font-family: var(--font-sans); width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; outline: none; transition: all 0.2s;\" onfocus=\"this.style.borderColor='var(--cmd-gold)'; this.style.background='var(--cmd-bg)';\" onblur=\"this.style.borderColor='transparent'; this.style.background='transparent';\">\n                        </td>\n                        <td style=\"padding: 0.5rem 1rem;\">\n                            <input type=\"text\" value=\"${inst.username}\" onchange=\"handleUpdateInstructorUsername('${inst.id}', this.value)\" style=\"background: transparent; color: var(--cmd-gold-light); border: 1px dashed transparent; border-radius: 4px; padding: 0.25rem 0.5rem; font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 500; font-family: var(--font-sans); width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; outline: none; transition: all 0.2s;\" onfocus=\"this.style.borderColor='var(--cmd-gold)'; this.style.background='var(--cmd-bg)';\" onblur=\"this.style.borderColor='transparent'; this.style.background='transparent';\">\n                        </td>\n                        <td style=\"padding: 0.5rem 1rem;\">\n                            <input type=\"text\" value=\"${inst.password}\" onchange=\"handleUpdateInstructorPassword('${inst.id}', this.value)\" style=\"background: transparent; color: var(--cmd-text-muted); border: 1px dashed transparent; border-radius: 4px; padding: 0.25rem 0.5rem; font-size: 0.9rem; font-family: monospace; width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; outline: none; transition: all 0.2s;\" onfocus=\"this.style.borderColor='var(--cmd-gold)'; this.style.background='var(--cmd-bg)';\" onblur=\"this.style.borderColor='transparent'; this.style.background='transparent';\">\n                        </td>\n                        <td style=\"padding: 1rem;\">${outreachHtml}</td>\n                        <td style=\"padding: 1rem; color: var(--cmd-text-muted);\">${dateStr}</td>\n                        <td style=\"padding: 1rem; text-align: right;\">\n                            <button class=\"cmd-btn-secondary\" onclick=\"handleDeleteInstructor('${inst.id}')\" style=\"padding: 0.3rem 0.8rem; font-size: 0.75rem; border-color: var(--cmd-danger); color: var(--cmd-danger);\">Delete</button>\n                        </td>\n                    `;\n                    body.appendChild(tr);\n                });\n            }\n\n            window.handleUpdateInstructorPassword = async (id, password) => {\n                const trimmed = password.trim();\n                if (!trimmed) {\n                    alert(\"Instructor password cannot be empty.\");\n                    return;\n                }\n                const res = await window.AuthAPI.updateInstructorPassword(id, trimmed);\n                if (res.success) {\n                    window.showToast(\"Instructor password updated!\");\n                } else {\n                    alert(\"Error: \" + (res.error || \"Failed to update instructor password.\"));\n                }\n            };\n\n            window.handleUpdateInstructorOutreach = async (id, outreach) => {\n                const res = await window.AuthAPI.updateInstructorOutreach(id, outreach);\n                if (res.success) {\n                    window.showToast(\"Instructor outreach updated!\");\n                } else {\n                    alert(\"Error: \" + (res.error || \"Failed to update outreach.\"));\n                }\n            };\n\n            window.handleUpdateInstructorName = async (id, name) => {\n                const trimmed = name.trim();\n                if (!trimmed) {\n                    alert(\"Instructor name cannot be empty.\");\n                    return;\n                }\n                const res = await window.AuthAPI.updateInstructorName(id, trimmed);\n                if (res.success) {\n                    window.showToast(\"Instructor name updated!\");\n                } else {\n                    alert(\"Error: \" + (res.error || \"Failed to update name.\"));\n                }\n            };\n\n            window.handleUpdateInstructorUsername = async (id, username) => {\n                const trimmed = username.trim();\n                if (!trimmed) {\n                    alert(\"Instructor username cannot be empty.\");\n                    return;\n                }\n                const res = await window.AuthAPI.updateInstructorUsername(id, trimmed);\n                if (res.success) {\n                    window.showToast(\"Instructor username updated!\");\n                } else {\n                    alert(\"Error: \" + (res.error || \"Failed to update username.\"));\n                }\n            };\n\n            window.handleDeleteInstructor = async (id) => {\n                if (confirm(\"Are you sure you want to delete this instructor account? They will lose access immediately.\")) {\n                    const res = await window.AuthAPI.deleteInstructor(id);\n                    if (res.success) {\n                        window.showToast(\"Instructor account deleted.\");\n                    } else {\n                        alert(res.error || \"Failed to delete instructor.\");\n                    }\n                }\n            };\n\n            // Apprentice Answers Modal implementation & navigation\n            let activeModalStudentId = null;\n            let activeModalTab = 'submissions';\n\n            window.viewStudentAnswers = (id) => {\n                activeModalStudentId = id;\n                const currentAdmin = window.AuthAPI.getCurrentAdmin();\n                const students = window.AuthAPI.getAllStudents();\n                const student = students.find(s => s.id === id);\n                if (student) {\n                    document.getElementById('modalStudentName').innerText = `${student.firstName} ${student.lastName}`;\n                    \n                    const unreadChatCount = (student.chatMessages || []).filter(m => m.senderId === student.id && !m.readByInstructor).length;\n                    const badge = document.getElementById('modal-chat-badge');\n                    if (badge) {\n                        if (unreadChatCount > 0) {\n                            badge.innerText = unreadChatCount;\n                            badge.style.display = 'inline-block';\n                        } else {\n                            badge.style.display = 'none';\n                        }\n                    }\n\n                    const container = document.getElementById('modalAnswersContainer');\n                    container.innerHTML = '';\n                    \n                    const answers = student.answers || [];\n                    if (answers.length === 0) {\n                        container.innerHTML = '<div style=\"text-align:center;color:var(--cmd-text-muted);padding:2rem;\">No submissions found for this student.</div>';\n                    } else {\n                        const grouped = {};\n                        answers.forEach(ans => {\n                            if (!grouped[ans.moduleId]) {\n                                grouped[ans.moduleId] = [];\n                            }\n                            grouped[ans.moduleId].push(ans);\n                        });\n                        \n                        Object.keys(grouped).forEach(modId => {\n                            const modIdx = modOrder.indexOf(modId) + 1;\n                            const modNum = modIdx > 0 ? `Module ${modIdx}: ` : '';\n                            const mod = modsContent[modId] || { title: 'Unknown Module', subtitle: '' };\n                            \n                            const modSection = document.createElement('div');\n                            modSection.style.border = '1.5px solid var(--cmd-border)';\n                            modSection.style.borderRadius = '12px';\n                            modSection.style.padding = '1.5rem';\n                            modSection.style.background = 'var(--cmd-bg)';\n                            modSection.style.marginBottom = '1.5rem';\n                            \n                            const header = document.createElement('div');\n                            header.style.borderBottom = '1px solid var(--cmd-border)';\n                            header.style.paddingBottom = '0.6rem';\n                            header.style.marginBottom = '1rem';\n                            header.innerHTML = `\n                                <h4 style=\"margin: 0; font-size: 1.15rem; color: var(--cmd-gold-light); font-family: var(--font-sans); text-align: left;\">${modNum}${mod.title}</h4>\n                            `;\n                            modSection.appendChild(header);\n                            \n                            const itemsContainer = document.createElement('div');\n                            itemsContainer.style.display = 'flex';\n                            itemsContainer.style.flexDirection = 'column';\n                            itemsContainer.style.gap = '1.2rem';\n                            \n                            grouped[modId].forEach((ans) => {\n                                const card = document.createElement('div');\n                                card.style.background = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.03)';\n                                card.style.padding = '1.2rem';\n                                card.style.borderRadius = '8px';\n                                card.style.border = '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05)';\n                                \n                                let typeLabel = ans.type ? ans.type.replace('_', ' ').toUpperCase() : 'REFLECTION';\n                                let contentHtml = '';\n                                let gradeHtml = '';\n                                let remarkFormHtml = '';\n                                \n                                if (ans.answer) {\n                                    contentHtml = `<p style=\"margin: 0.5rem 0; color: var(--cmd-text-main); line-height: 1.5; font-size: 0.92rem; text-align: left;\"><strong>Response:</strong> <span style=\"font-style: italic; color: var(--cmd-text-main);\">\"${ans.answer}\"</span></p>`;\n                                } else if (ans.file) {\n                                    let previewHtml = '';\n                                    if (ans.file.url) {\n                                        const ext = ans.file.name.split('.').pop().toLowerCase();\n                                        const isImg = ['png', 'jpg', 'jpeg', 'gif', 'webp'].includes(ext);\n                                        const isVid = ['mp4', 'webm', 'mov'].includes(ext);\n                                        if (isImg) {\n                                            previewHtml = `<div style=\"margin-top:0.5rem;\"><img src=\"${ans.file.url}\" style=\"max-height: 180px; max-width: 100%; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid var(--cmd-border); object-fit: contain;\"></div>`;\n                                        } else if (isVid) {\n                                            previewHtml = `<div style=\"margin-top:0.5rem;\"><video src=\"${ans.file.url}\" controls style=\"max-height: 200px; max-width: 100%; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid var(--cmd-border); background:#000;\"></video></div>`;\n                                        }\n                                    }\n                                    contentHtml = `\n                                        <div style=\"margin: 0.5rem 0; font-size: 0.92rem; color: var(--cmd-text-main); text-align: left;\">\n                                            <strong>Attached File:</strong> <span style=\"font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--cmd-gold-light);\">${ans.file.name} (${ans.file.size})</span>\n                                            ${previewHtml}\n                                        </div>\n                                    `;\n                                }\n                                \n                                if (ans.score !== null) {\n                                    gradeHtml = `\n                                        <div style=\"font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: bold; color: ${ans.isCorrect ? 'var(--cmd-mint)' : 'var(--cmd-danger)'}; margin-top: 0.4rem; text-align: left;\">\n                                            Auto-Graded Result: ${ans.score} / ${ans.maxScore} (${ans.isCorrect ? 'CORRECT' : 'INCORRECT'})\n                                        </div>\n                                    `;\n                                }\n                                \n                                if (ans.type === 'reflection' || ans.type === 'essay' || ans.type === 'file_upload' || !ans.type) {\n                                    const currentRemark = ans.teacherRemarks || '';\n                                    remarkFormHtml = `\n                                        <div style=\"margin-top: 1rem; border-top: 1px dashed rgba(255,255,255,0.08); padding-top: 1rem; text-align: left;\">\n                                            <label style=\"display: block; font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--cmd-gold-light); font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0.4rem;\">INSTRUCTOR REMARKS / COMMENTS</label>\n                                            <div style=\"display: flex; gap: 0.6rem;\">\n                                                <textarea id=\"remark_input_${ans.moduleId}_${ans.componentIndex !== null ? ans.componentIndex : ''}\" class=\"cmd-input\" rows=\"2\" placeholder=\"Type your remarks here...\">${currentRemark}</textarea>\n                                                <button class=\"cmd-btn\" style=\"font-size: 0.85rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem;\" onclick=\"saveRemarks('${id}', '${ans.moduleId}', ${ans.componentIndex !== null ? ans.componentIndex : 'null'})\">Save</button>\n                                            </div>\n                                            ${ans.teacherRemarksDate ? `<span style=\"font-size: 0.72rem; color: var(--cmd-text-muted); margin-top: 0.4rem; display: block;\">Last comment saved on ${new Date(ans.teacherRemarksDate).toLocaleString()} by ${ans.teacherRemarksAdmin || 'Admin'}</span>` : ''}\n                                        </div>\n                                    `;\n                                }\n                                \n                                card.innerHTML = `\n                                    <div style=\"display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05); padding-bottom: 0.4rem; margin-bottom: 0.6rem;\">\n                                        <span style=\"font-weight: bold; font-size: 0.92rem; color: var(--cmd-text-main); text-align: left;\">${ans.question}</span>\n                                        <span style=\"background: rgba(212,175,55,0.15); color: var(--cmd-gold-light); border: 1px solid var(--cmd-border); font-size: 0.65rem; padding: 0.15rem 0.4rem; border-radius: 4px;\">${typeLabel}</span>\n                                    </div>\n                                    ${contentHtml}\n                                    ${gradeHtml}\n                                    ${remarkFormHtml}\n                                `;\n                                itemsContainer.appendChild(card);\n                            });\n                            \n                            modSection.appendChild(itemsContainer);\n                            container.appendChild(modSection);\n                        });\n                    }\n                    \n                    switchModalTab(activeModalTab || 'submissions');\n                    document.getElementById('answersModal').classList.add('active');\n                }\n            };\n\n            window.saveRemarks = async (studentId, moduleId, componentIndex) => {\n                const searchIdx = componentIndex !== null ? componentIndex : '';\n                const textarea = document.getElementById(`remark_input_${moduleId}_${searchIdx}`);\n                if (!textarea) return;\n                const remarkText = textarea.value.trim();\n                \n                const adminName = currentAdmin ? (currentAdmin.displayName || currentAdmin.username) : 'Admin';\n                \n                const res = await window.AuthAPI.saveTeacherRemark(studentId, moduleId, componentIndex, remarkText, adminName);\n                if (res.success) {\n                    window.showToast('Remarks saved and student notified!');\n                    window.viewStudentAnswers(studentId);\n                } else {\n                    alert('Error saving remarks: ' + (res.error || 'unknown error'));\n                }\n            };\n\n            window.closeAnswersModal = () => {\n                document.getElementById('answersModal').classList.remove('active');\n                activeModalStudentId = null;\n                activeModalTab = 'submissions';\n            };\n\n            // Bind modal sub-tab buttons\n            document.getElementById('modal-tab-submissions').addEventListener('click', () => switchModalTab('submissions'));\n            document.getElementById('modal-tab-qa').addEventListener('click', () => switchModalTab('qa'));\n            document.getElementById('modal-tab-chat').addEventListener('click', () => switchModalTab('chat'));\n\n            function switchModalTab(tabId) {\n                activeModalTab = tabId;\n                \n                // Toggle active styles\n                document.querySelectorAll('#answersModal .cmd-tab-btn').forEach(btn => btn.classList.remove('active'));\n                const paneSub = document.getElementById('modalContentSubmissions');\n                const paneQA = document.getElementById('modalContentQA');\n                const paneChat = document.getElementById('modalContentChat');\n                \n                [paneSub, paneQA, paneChat].forEach(p => p.classList.add('hidden'));\n\n                if (tabId === 'submissions') {\n                    document.getElementById('modal-tab-submissions').classList.add('active');\n                    paneSub.classList.remove('hidden');\n                } else if (tabId === 'qa') {\n                    document.getElementById('modal-tab-qa').classList.add('active');\n                    paneQA.classList.remove('hidden');\n                    renderModalQA();\n                } else if (tabId === 'chat') {\n                    document.getElementById('modal-tab-chat').classList.add('active');\n                    paneChat.classList.remove('hidden');\n                    renderModalChat();\n                    \n                    if (activeModalStudentId) {\n                        window.AuthAPI.markChatAsRead(activeModalStudentId, 'instructor');\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n\n            function renderModalQA() {\n                const paneQA = document.getElementById('modalContentQA');\n                if (!paneQA || !activeModalStudentId) return;\n                const students = window.AuthAPI.getAllStudents();\n                const student = students.find(s => s.id === activeModalStudentId);\n                if (!student) return;\n                \n                paneQA.innerHTML = '';\n                const questions = student.questions || [];\n                if (questions.length === 0) {\n                    paneQA.innerHTML = '<div style=\"text-align:center;color:var(--cmd-text-muted);padding:3rem;\">No questions asked by this student yet.</div>';\n                    return;\n                }\n                \n                const grouped = {};\n                questions.forEach(q => {\n                    if (!grouped[q.moduleId]) {\n                        grouped[q.moduleId] = [];\n                    }\n                    grouped[q.moduleId].push(q);\n                });\n                \n                Object.keys(grouped).forEach(modId => {\n                    const modIdx = modOrder.indexOf(modId) + 1;\n                    const modNum = modIdx > 0 ? `Module ${modIdx}: ` : '';\n                    const mod = modsContent[modId] || { title: modId, subtitle: '' };\n                    \n                    const modSection = document.createElement('div');\n                    modSection.style.border = '1.5px solid var(--cmd-border)';\n                    modSection.style.borderRadius = '12px';\n                    modSection.style.padding = '1.5rem';\n                    modSection.style.background = 'var(--cmd-bg)';\n                    modSection.style.marginBottom = '1.5rem';\n                    \n                    const header = document.createElement('div');\n                    header.style.borderBottom = '1px solid var(--cmd-border)';\n                    header.style.paddingBottom = '0.6rem';\n                    header.style.marginBottom = '1rem';\n                    header.innerHTML = `\n                        <h4 style=\"margin: 0; font-size: 1.15rem; color: var(--cmd-gold-light); font-family: var(--font-sans); text-align: left;\">${modNum}${mod.title}</h4>\n                    `;\n                    modSection.appendChild(header);\n                    \n                    const itemsContainer = document.createElement('div');\n                    itemsContainer.style.display = 'flex';\n                    itemsContainer.style.flexDirection = 'column';\n                    itemsContainer.style.gap = '1.2rem';\n                    \n                    grouped[modId].forEach((q) => {\n                        const card = document.createElement('div');\n                        card.style.background = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.03)';\n                        card.style.padding = '1.2rem';\n                        card.style.borderRadius = '8px';\n                        card.style.border = '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05)';\n                        \n                        const dateStr = q.timestamp ? new Date(q.timestamp).toLocaleString() : '';\n                        \n                        // Question contents\n                        let questionHtml = `<div style=\"text-align: left; margin-bottom: 0.8rem;\"><span style=\"color: var(--cmd-gold); font-weight: bold; font-size: 0.85rem;\">Q: </span><span style=\"font-size: 0.95rem; color: var(--cmd-text-main);\">${q.questionText}</span><span style=\"display:block; font-size:0.7rem; color:var(--cmd-text-muted); margin-top:2px;\">${dateStr}</span></div>`;\n                        \n                        // Replies\n                        let repliesHtml = '';\n                        const replies = q.replies || [];\n                        if (replies.length > 0) {\n                            repliesHtml = '<div style=\"display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:0.6rem; margin-top:0.8rem; padding-left:1rem; border-left:2px solid var(--cmd-mint);\">';\n                            replies.forEach(rep => {\n                                const repDate = rep.date ? new Date(rep.date).toLocaleString() : '';\n                                repliesHtml += `\n                                    <div style=\"font-size: 0.88rem; text-align: left;\">\n                                        <strong style=\"color: var(--cmd-mint);\">${rep.replierName}</strong>: <span style=\"color: var(--cmd-text-main);\">${rep.replyText}</span>\n                                        <span style=\"display:block; font-size:0.65rem; color:var(--cmd-text-muted); margin-top:1px;\">${repDate}</span>\n                                    </div>\n                                `;\n                            });\n                            repliesHtml += '</div>';\n                        } else {\n                            repliesHtml = '<div style=\"font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--cmd-text-muted); margin-top:0.5rem; text-align:left; font-style:italic;\">No replies yet.</div>';\n                        }\n\n                        // Reply Form\n                        let replyFormHtml = `\n                            <div style=\"margin-top: 1rem; border-top: 1px dashed rgba(255,255,255,0.08); padding-top: 1rem; text-align: left; display: flex; gap: 0.6rem;\">\n                                <input type=\"text\" id=\"reply_input_${q.id}\" class=\"cmd-input\" placeholder=\"Type your reply here...\">\n                                <button class=\"cmd-btn\" style=\"font-size: 0.85rem; padding: 0.5rem 1.2rem;\" onclick=\"saveReply('${q.studentId}', '${q.id}')\">Reply</button>\n                            </div>\n                        `;\n\n                        card.innerHTML = `\n                            ${questionHtml}\n                            ${repliesHtml}\n                            ${replyFormHtml}\n                        `;\n                        itemsContainer.appendChild(card);\n                    });\n                    \n                    modSection.appendChild(itemsContainer);\n                    paneQA.appendChild(modSection);\n                });\n            }\n\n            window.saveReply = async (studentId, questionId) => {\n                const input = document.getElementById(`reply_input_${questionId}`);\n                if (!input) return;\n                const replyText = input.value.trim();\n                if (!replyText) return;\n                \n                const adminName = currentAdmin ? (currentAdmin.displayName || currentAdmin.username) : 'Admin';\n                \n                const res = await window.AuthAPI.replyToQuestion(studentId, questionId, replyText, adminName);\n                if (res.success) {\n                    window.showToast(\"Reply saved successfully!\");\n                    renderModalQA();\n                } else {\n                    alert(\"Error: \" + (res.error || \"Failed to save reply.\"));\n                }\n            };\n\n            function renderModalChat() {\n                const paneChat = document.getElementById('modalContentChat');\n                if (!paneChat || !activeModalStudentId) return;\n                const students = window.AuthAPI.getAllStudents();\n                const student = students.find(s => s.id === activeModalStudentId);\n                if (!student) return;\n                \n                paneChat.innerHTML = '';\n                \n                const chatBox = document.createElement('div');\n                chatBox.style.display = 'flex';\n                chatBox.style.flexDirection = 'column';\n                chatBox.style.height = '420px';\n                chatBox.style.background = 'var(--cmd-bg)';\n                chatBox.style.borderRadius = '12px';\n                chatBox.style.border = '1px solid var(--cmd-border)';\n                chatBox.style.overflow = 'hidden';\n                \n                const msgsArea = document.createElement('div');\n                msgsArea.id = 'chat-messages-area';\n                msgsArea.style.flex = '1';\n                msgsArea.style.overflowY = 'auto';\n                msgsArea.style.padding = '1.5rem';\n                msgsArea.style.display = 'flex';\n                msgsArea.style.flexDirection = 'column';\n                msgsArea.style.gap = '1rem';\n                \n                const messages = student.chatMessages || [];\n                if (messages.length === 0) {\n                    msgsArea.innerHTML = '<div style=\"text-align:center;color:var(--cmd-text-muted);margin:auto;padding:2rem;\">Start a private message thread.</div>';\n                } else {\n                    messages.forEach(msg => {\n                        const isMe = msg.senderId !== student.id;\n                        const wrapper = document.createElement('div');\n                        wrapper.style.display = 'flex';\n                        wrapper.style.justifyContent = isMe ? 'flex-end' : 'flex-start';\n                        \n                        const bubble = document.createElement('div');\n                        bubble.style.maxWidth = '70%';\n                        bubble.style.padding = '0.8rem 1.1rem';\n                        bubble.style.borderRadius = isMe ? '18px 18px 4px 18px' : '18px 18px 18px 4px';\n                        bubble.style.background = isMe ? 'linear-gradient(135deg, var(--cmd-gold), var(--cmd-gold-light))' : 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05)';\n                        bubble.style.border = isMe ? 'none' : '1px solid var(--cmd-border)';\n                        bubble.style.color = isMe ? '#000' : 'var(--cmd-text-main)';\n                        bubble.style.textAlign = 'left';\n                        \n                        bubble.innerHTML = `\n                            <div style=\"font-size: 0.72rem; color: ${isMe ? '#000' : 'var(--cmd-gold)'}; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0.25rem;\">\n                                ${msg.senderName}\n                            </div>\n                            <div style=\"font-size: 0.9rem; line-height: 1.4; word-break: break-word;\">${msg.message}</div>\n                            <div style=\"font-size: 0.65rem; color: ${isMe ? 'rgba(0,0,0,0.5)' : 'var(--cmd-text-muted)'}; text-align: right; margin-top: 0.3rem;\">\n                                ${new Date(msg.date).toLocaleTimeString([], {hour: '2-digit', minute:'2-digit'})}\n                            </div>\n                        `;\n                        wrapper.appendChild(bubble);\n                        msgsArea.appendChild(wrapper);\n                    });\n                }\n                \n                const inputArea = document.createElement('div');\n                inputArea.style.padding = '1rem';\n                inputArea.style.borderTop = '1px solid var(--cmd-border)';\n                inputArea.style.background = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2)';\n                inputArea.style.display = 'flex';\n                inputArea.style.gap = '0.8rem';\n                \n                inputArea.innerHTML = `\n                    <input type=\"text\" id=\"chat-send-input\" class=\"cmd-input\" style=\"flex: 1; border-radius: 20px;\" placeholder=\"Type your message here...\">\n                    <button class=\"cmd-btn\" id=\"btn-chat-send\" style=\"border-radius: 20px;\">Send</button>\n                `;\n                \n                chatBox.appendChild(msgsArea);\n                chatBox.appendChild(inputArea);\n                paneChat.appendChild(chatBox);\n                \n                setTimeout(() => {\n                    msgsArea.scrollTop = msgsArea.scrollHeight;\n                    const input = document.getElementById('chat-send-input');\n                    if (input) {\n                        input.focus();\n                        input.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {\n                            if (e.key === 'Enter') {\n                                document.getElementById('btn-chat-send').click();\n                            }\n                        });\n                    }\n                }, 100);\n                \n                document.getElementById('btn-chat-send').addEventListener('click', async () => {\n                    const input = document.getElementById('chat-send-input');\n                    const val = input.value.trim();\n                    if (!val) return;\n                    \n                    const senderId = 'admin';\n                    const senderName = currentAdmin ? (currentAdmin.displayName || currentAdmin.username) : 'Admin';\n                    \n                    input.value = '';\n                    const res = await window.AuthAPI.sendChatMessage(student.id, val, senderId, senderName);\n                    if (res.success) {\n                        renderModalChat();\n                    } else {\n                        alert(\"Error sending message: \" + (res.error || \"unknown\"));\n                    }\n                });\n            }\n\n            // --- Course Builder Logics Engine ---\n            const modsContentInitial = window.AuthAPI.getModulesContent();\n            let currentModuleId = Object.keys(modsContentInitial)[0] || '';\n            let currentComponents = [];\n            let activeInsertIndex = -1; // -1 means End of Lesson\n            const insertPosSelect = document.getElementById('builder-insert-pos');\n            const selectModule = document.getElementById('builder-module-select');\n            const btnPptModule = document.getElementById('btn-ppt-module');\n            const titleInput = document.getElementById('builder-module-title');\n            const subtitleInput = document.getElementById('builder-module-subtitle');\n            const compContainer = document.getElementById('builder-components-container');\n            const btnAddComp = document.getElementById('btn-add-comp');\n            const addTypeSelect = document.getElementById('builder-add-type');\n            const btnSaveModule = document.getElementById('btn-save-module');\n\n            if (btnPptModule) {\n                btnPptModule.addEventListener('click', () => {\n                    if (currentModuleId) {\n                        generateModulePPT(currentModuleId);\n                    } else {\n                        alert('No active module selected.');\n                    }\n                });\n            }\n\n            function populateModuleSelect() {\n                if (!selectModule) return;\n                const modsContent = window.AuthAPI.getModulesContent();\n                const selectedVal = selectModule.value || currentModuleId;\n                \n                selectModule.innerHTML = '';\n                window.AuthAPI.getModuleOrder().filter(id => modsContent[id]).forEach((id, idx) => {\n                    const option = document.createElement('option');\n                    option.value = id;\n                    option.innerText = `Module ${idx + 1}: ${modsContent[id].title || id}`;\n                    selectModule.appendChild(option);\n                });\n                \n                if (modsContent[selectedVal]) {\n                    selectModule.value = selectedVal;\n                } else if (selectModule.options.length > 0) {\n                    selectModule.selectedIndex = 0;\n                    currentModuleId = selectModule.value;\n                } else {\n                    currentModuleId = '';\n                }\n            }\n            \n            selectModule.addEventListener('change', () => {\n                currentModuleId = selectModule.value;\n                loadBuilderModule();\n            });\n\n            // Bind Add Module Button\n            const btnAddModule = document.getElementById('btn-add-module');\n            if (btnAddModule) {\n                btnAddModule.addEventListener('click', () => {\n                    const title = prompt('Enter the title for the new module:');\n                    if (title === null) return;\n                    const trimmedTitle = title.trim();\n                    if (!trimmedTitle) {\n                        alert('Module title cannot be empty.');\n                        return;\n                    }\n                    const subtitle = prompt('Enter the subtitle/description for the new module:') || '';\n                    const newId = window.AuthAPI.addModule(trimmedTitle, subtitle.trim());\n                    if (newId) {\n                        window.showToast(`Created Module: ${trimmedTitle}`);\n                        currentModuleId = newId;\n                        populateModuleSelect();\n                        loadBuilderModule();\n                    }\n                });\n            }\n\n            // Bind Delete Module Global function\n            window.handleDeleteModule = (id) => {\n                if (!id) {\n                    alert('No module selected.');\n                    return;\n                }\n                if (confirm('Are you sure you want to delete this module? This will remove all its content permanently.')) {\n                    const deleted = window.AuthAPI.deleteModule(id);\n                    if (deleted) {\n                        window.showToast('Module deleted successfully.');\n                        const modsContent = window.AuthAPI.getModulesContent();\n                        const modIds = window.AuthAPI.getModuleOrder().filter(mId => modsContent[mId]);\n                        if (currentModuleId === id) {\n                            currentModuleId = modIds[0] || '';\n                        }\n                        populateModuleSelect();\n                        loadBuilderModule();\n                    }\n                }\n            };\n\n            // Bind Rename Module Global function\n            window.handleRenameModule = (id) => {\n                if (!id) {\n                    alert('No module selected.');\n                    return;\n                }\n                const mod = window.AuthAPI.getModule(id);\n                if (mod) {\n                    const newTitle = prompt('Enter a new title for this module:', mod.title);\n                    if (newTitle === null) return;\n                    const trimmedTitle = newTitle.trim();\n                    if (!trimmedTitle) {\n                        alert('Module title cannot be empty.');\n                        return;\n                    }\n                    window.AuthAPI.saveModule(id, trimmedTitle, mod.subtitle || '', mod.components || []);\n                    window.showToast('Module title updated successfully.');\n                    populateModuleSelect();\n                    if (currentModuleId === id) {\n                        loadBuilderModule();\n                    }\n                }\n            };\n\n            function updateInsertPosDropdown() {\n                if (!insertPosSelect) return;\n                const currentVal = activeInsertIndex;\n                insertPosSelect.innerHTML = '';\n                \n                // Add End of Lesson option\n                const endOpt = document.createElement('option');\n                endOpt.value = '-1';\n                endOpt.innerText = 'End of Lesson';\n                insertPosSelect.appendChild(endOpt);\n                \n                currentComponents.forEach((comp, idx) => {\n                    const opt = document.createElement('option');\n                    opt.value = idx.toString();\n                    const label = comp.type.toUpperCase().replace('_', ' ');\n                    const rawContent = comp.content || '';\n                    const previewText = rawContent.replace(/<[^>]*>/g, '').substring(0, 30);\n                    opt.innerText = `Block ${idx + 1}: ${label} ${previewText ? ' - ' + previewText + '...' : ''}`;\n                    insertPosSelect.appendChild(opt);\n                });\n                \n                if (currentVal >= -1 && currentVal < currentComponents.length) {\n                    insertPosSelect.value = currentVal.toString();\n                } else {\n                    activeInsertIndex = -1;\n                    insertPosSelect.value = '-1';\n                }\n            }\n\n            function highlightActiveInsertTarget() {\n                const blockCards = document.querySelectorAll('#builder-components-container .builder-block-card');\n                blockCards.forEach((card, idx) => {\n                    if (idx === activeInsertIndex) {\n                        card.classList.add('active-insert-target');\n                        const badgeContainer = card.querySelector('.target-badge-container');\n                        if (badgeContainer) {\n                            badgeContainer.innerHTML = '🎯 <span style=\"font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: bold; color: var(--cmd-gold); letter-spacing: 1px; margin-left: 0.3rem;\">Active Insert Target</span>';\n                        }\n                    } else {\n                        card.classList.remove('active-insert-target');\n                        const badgeContainer = card.querySelector('.target-badge-container');\n                        if (badgeContainer) {\n                            badgeContainer.innerHTML = '';\n                        }\n                    }\n                });\n            }\n\n            if (insertPosSelect) {\n                insertPosSelect.addEventListener('change', () => {\n                    activeInsertIndex = parseInt(insertPosSelect.value);\n                    highlightActiveInsertTarget();\n                });\n            }\n\n            function loadBuilderModule() {\n                const mod = window.AuthAPI.getModule(currentModuleId);\n                if (mod) {\n                    titleInput.value = mod.title || '';\n                    subtitleInput.value = mod.subtitle || '';\n                    currentComponents = mod.components ? [...mod.components] : [];\n                    activeInsertIndex = -1;\n                    renderBuilderComponents();\n                    \n                    const previewBtn = document.getElementById('btn-preview-module');\n                    if (previewBtn) {\n                        previewBtn.href = `module.html?id=${currentModuleId}&preview=true`;\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n\n            function renderBuilderComponents() {\n                compContainer.innerHTML = '';\n                if (currentComponents.length === 0) {\n                    compContainer.innerHTML = '<p style=\"color: var(--cmd-text-muted); font-style: italic; text-align: center; padding: 2rem;\">No blocks added yet. Click \"+ Add to Lesson\" to start building this lesson.</p>';\n                    updateInsertPosDropdown();\n                    return;\n                }\n                \n                currentComponents.forEach((comp, index) => {\n                    if (!comp || !comp.type) return;\n                    const blockCard = document.createElement('div');\n                    blockCard.className = 'cmd-card builder-block-card';\n                    blockCard.style.padding = '1.5rem';\n                    blockCard.style.borderColor = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.06)';\n                    blockCard.style.background = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.2)';\n                    \n                    const label = comp.type.toUpperCase().replace('_', ' ');\n                    \n                    if (!comp.color) comp.color = 'default';\n                    if (!comp.bg) comp.bg = 'none';\n                    if (!comp.emoji) comp.emoji = '💡';\n                    if (!comp.title) {\n                        comp.title = comp.type === 'file_upload' ? 'Submit Assignment File' :\n                                     comp.type === 'toggle_list' ? 'Click to expand details' : '';\n                    }\n                    \n                    blockCard.innerHTML = `\n                        <div style=\"display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 0.8rem; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.03); padding-bottom: 0.5rem;\">\n                            <div style=\"display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem;\">\n                                <span style=\"font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: bold; color: var(--cmd-gold); letter-spacing: 1px;\">BLOCK ${index + 1}: ${label}</span>\n                                <span class=\"target-badge-container\" style=\"display: inline-flex; align-items: center;\"></span>\n                            </div>\n                            <div style=\"display: flex; gap: 0.5rem;\">\n                                <button type=\"button\" class=\"cmd-btn-secondary\" style=\"padding: 0.2rem 0.5rem; font-size: 0.75rem;\" onclick=\"moveBlock(${index}, -1)\" ${index === 0 ? 'disabled' : ''}>▲ Up</button>\n                                <button type=\"button\" class=\"cmd-btn-secondary\" style=\"padding: 0.2rem 0.5rem; font-size: 0.75rem;\" onclick=\"moveBlock(${index}, 1)\" ${index === currentComponents.length - 1 ? 'disabled' : ''}>▼ Down</button>\n                                <button type=\"button\" class=\"cmd-btn-secondary\" style=\"padding: 0.2rem 0.5rem; font-size: 0.75rem; border-color: var(--cmd-danger); color: var(--cmd-danger);\" onclick=\"deleteBlock(${index})\">Delete</button>\n                            </div>\n                        </div>\n                        \n                        <div style=\"display: flex; gap: 1rem; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 0.8rem; flex-wrap: wrap;\">\n                            <div style=\"display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.3rem;\">\n                                <span style=\"font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--cmd-text-muted);\">Text Color:</span>\n                                <select class=\"cmd-input block-color-select\" data-index=\"${index}\" style=\"padding: 0.25rem; font-size: 0.75rem; width: 100px; cursor: pointer; background: var(--cmd-bg); height: auto;\">\n                                    <option value=\"default\" ${comp.color === 'default' ? 'selected' : ''}>Default</option>\n                                    <option value=\"navy\" ${comp.color === 'navy' ? 'selected' : ''}>Navy</option>\n                                    <option value=\"gold\" ${comp.color === 'gold' ? 'selected' : ''}>Gold</option>\n                                    <option value=\"red\" ${comp.color === 'red' ? 'selected' : ''}>Red</option>\n                                    <option value=\"green\" ${comp.color === 'green' ? 'selected' : ''}>Green</option>\n                                </select>\n                            </div>\n                            <div style=\"display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.3rem;\">\n                                <span style=\"font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--cmd-text-muted);\">Highlight:</span>\n                                <select class=\"cmd-input block-bg-select\" data-index=\"${index}\" style=\"padding: 0.25rem; font-size: 0.75rem; width: 110px; cursor: pointer; background: var(--cmd-bg); height: auto;\">\n                                    <option value=\"none\" ${comp.bg === 'none' ? 'selected' : ''}>None</option>\n                                    <option value=\"soft-gold\" ${comp.bg === 'soft-gold' ? 'selected' : ''}>Soft Gold</option>\n                                    <option value=\"soft-navy\" ${comp.bg === 'soft-navy' ? 'selected' : ''}>Soft Navy</option>\n                                    <option value=\"soft-red\" ${comp.bg === 'soft-red' ? 'selected' : ''}>Soft Red</option>\n                                    <option value=\"soft-green\" ${comp.bg === 'soft-green' ? 'selected' : ''}>Soft Green</option>\n                                </select>\n                            </div>\n                            <div style=\"display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.3rem;\">\n                                <span style=\"font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--cmd-text-muted);\">Font:</span>\n                                <select class=\"cmd-input block-font-select\" data-index=\"${index}\" style=\"padding: 0.25rem; font-size: 0.75rem; width: 120px; cursor: pointer; background: var(--cmd-bg); height: auto;\">\n                                    <option value=\"default\" ${comp.font === 'default' || !comp.font ? 'selected' : ''}>Default (Sans)</option>\n                                    <option value=\"serif\" ${comp.font === 'serif' ? 'selected' : ''}>Luxury Serif</option>\n                                    <option value=\"mono\" ${comp.font === 'mono' ? 'selected' : ''}>Telemetry Code</option>\n                                </select>\n                            </div>\n                        </div>\n\n                        <div style=\"margin-top: 0.5rem;\">\n                            ${comp.type === 'callout' ? \n                               `<div>\n                                   <label style=\"display:block;font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--cmd-text-muted);margin-bottom:0.3rem;\">Callout Icon Emoji</label>\n                                   <input class=\"cmd-input block-emoji-input\" style=\"width:80px;margin-bottom:0.5rem;\" data-index=\"${index}\" value=\"${comp.emoji || '💡'}\">\n                                   <label style=\"display:block;font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--cmd-text-muted);margin-bottom:0.3rem;\">Callout Text</label>\n                                   ${getFormattingToolbarMarkup(index, 'content')}\n                                   <div class=\"glass-input block-content-textarea\" contenteditable=\"true\" data-index=\"${index}\" style=\"width: 100%; font-family: var(--font-sans); line-height: 1.5; min-height: 4.5rem; overflow-y: auto;\" placeholder=\"Enter callout description...\">${comp.content || ''}</div>\n                               </div>` : \n                               comp.type === 'toggle_list' ? \n                               `<div>\n                                   <label style=\"display:block;font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--cmd-text-muted);margin-bottom:0.3rem;\">Toggle Title</label>\n                                   <input class=\"cmd-input block-title-input\" style=\"width:100%;margin-bottom:0.5rem;\" data-index=\"${index}\" value=\"${comp.title || ''}\">\n                                   <label style=\"display:block;font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--cmd-text-muted);margin-bottom:0.3rem;\">Toggle Content Description</label>\n                                   ${getFormattingToolbarMarkup(index, 'content')}\n                                   <div class=\"glass-input block-content-textarea\" contenteditable=\"true\" data-index=\"${index}\" style=\"width: 100%; font-family: var(--font-sans); line-height: 1.5; min-height: 6rem; overflow-y: auto;\" placeholder=\"Enter details to toggle reveal...\">${comp.content || ''}</div>\n                               </div>` :\n                               comp.type === 'file_upload' ?\n                               `<div>\n                                   <label style=\"display:block;font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--cmd-text-muted);margin-bottom:0.3rem;\">File Submission Header Title</label>\n                                   <input class=\"cmd-input block-title-input\" style=\"width:100%;margin-bottom:0.5rem;\" data-index=\"${index}\" value=\"${comp.title || ''}\">\n                                   <label style=\"display:block;font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--cmd-text-muted);margin-bottom:0.3rem;\">Instructions Content Description</label>\n                                   ${getFormattingToolbarMarkup(index, 'content')}\n                                   <div class=\"glass-input block-content-textarea\" contenteditable=\"true\" data-index=\"${index}\" style=\"width: 100%; font-family: var(--font-sans); line-height: 1.5; min-height: 4.5rem; overflow-y: auto;\" placeholder=\"Enter instructions...\">${comp.content || ''}</div>\n                               </div>` :\n                               comp.type === 'flip_card' ?\n                               `<div>\n                                   <label style=\"display:block;font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--cmd-text-muted);margin-bottom:0.3rem;\">Card Front Side Text</label>\n                                   <input class=\"cmd-input block-field-input\" style=\"width:100%;margin-bottom:0.5rem;\" data-index=\"${index}\" data-field=\"front\" value=\"${comp.front || ''}\">\n                                   <label style=\"display:block;font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--cmd-text-muted);margin-bottom:0.3rem;\">Card Back Side Text (Reveal)</label>\n                                   <input class=\"cmd-input block-field-input\" style=\"width:100%;margin-bottom:0.5rem;\" data-index=\"${index}\" data-field=\"back\" value=\"${comp.back || ''}\">\n                                   <label style=\"display:block;font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--cmd-text-muted);margin-bottom:0.3rem;\">Card Front Icon</label>\n                                   <input class=\"cmd-input block-field-input\" style=\"width:80px;\" data-index=\"${index}\" data-field=\"icon\" value=\"${comp.icon || '💡'}\">\n                                </div>` :\n                               comp.type === 'multiple_choice' ?\n                               (() => {\n                                   const opts = comp.options || ['', '', '', ''];\n                                   return `<div>\n                                   <label style=\"display:block;font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--cmd-text-muted);margin-bottom:0.3rem;\">Question</label>\n                                   ${getFormattingToolbarMarkup(index, 'question')}\n                                   <div class=\"glass-input block-field-input\" contenteditable=\"true\" data-index=\"${index}\" data-field=\"question\" style=\"width:100%;font-family:var(--font-sans);font-size:0.85rem;min-height:3.5rem;overflow-y:auto;\" placeholder=\"Enter MCQ Question...\">${comp.question || ''}</div>\n                                   ${['A','B','C','D'].map((l,i) => `\n                                   <label style=\"display:block;font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--cmd-text-muted);margin-top:0.6rem;margin-bottom:0.2rem;\">Option ${l}</label>\n                                   <input class=\"cmd-input block-field-input\" style=\"width:100%;\" data-index=\"${index}\" data-field=\"options.${i}\" value=\"${(comp.options||[])[i]||''}\">`).join('')}\n                                   <label style=\"display:block;font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--cmd-text-muted);margin-top:0.7rem;margin-bottom:0.3rem;\">Correct Answer (0=A, 1=B, 2=C, 3=D)</label>\n                                   <input class=\"cmd-input block-field-input\" style=\"width:80px;\" type=\"number\" min=\"0\" max=\"3\" data-index=\"${index}\" data-field=\"correct_index\" value=\"${comp.correct_index ?? 0}\">\n                                   <label style=\"display:block;font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--cmd-text-muted);margin-top:0.7rem;margin-bottom:0.3rem;\">Explanation (shown after answer)</label>\n                                   ${getFormattingToolbarMarkup(index, 'explanation')}\n                                   <div class=\"glass-input block-field-input\" contenteditable=\"true\" data-index=\"${index}\" data-field=\"explanation\" style=\"width:100%;font-family:var(--font-sans);font-size:0.85rem;min-height:3.5rem;overflow-y:auto;\" placeholder=\"Enter explanation for correct answer...\">${comp.explanation || ''}</div>\n                                   </div>`;\n                               })() :\n                               comp.type === 'true_false' ?\n                               `<div>\n                                   <label style=\"display:block;font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--cmd-text-muted);margin-bottom:0.3rem;\">Statement</label>\n                                   ${getFormattingToolbarMarkup(index, 'statement')}\n                                   <div class=\"glass-input block-field-input\" contenteditable=\"true\" data-index=\"${index}\" data-field=\"statement\" style=\"width:100%;font-family:var(--font-sans);font-size:0.85rem;min-height:3.5rem;overflow-y:auto;\" placeholder=\"Enter statement...\">${comp.statement || ''}</div>\n                                   <label style=\"display:block;font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--cmd-text-muted);margin-top:0.7rem;margin-bottom:0.3rem;\">Correct Answer</label>\n                                   <select class=\"cmd-input block-field-input\" style=\"width:100%; background: var(--cmd-bg);\" data-index=\"${index}\" data-field=\"correct\">\n                                       <option value=\"true\" ${comp.correct===true||comp.correct==='true'?'selected':''}>TRUE</option>\n                                       <option value=\"false\" ${comp.correct===false||comp.correct==='false'?'selected':''}>FALSE</option>\n                                   </select>\n                                   <label style=\"display:block;font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--cmd-text-muted);margin-top:0.7rem;margin-bottom:0.3rem;\">Explanation</label>\n                                   ${getFormattingToolbarMarkup(index, 'explanation')}\n                                   <div class=\"glass-input block-field-input\" contenteditable=\"true\" data-index=\"${index}\" data-field=\"explanation\" style=\"width:100%;font-family:var(--font-sans);font-size:0.85rem;min-height:3.5rem;overflow-y:auto;\" placeholder=\"Enter explanation...\">${comp.explanation || ''}</div>\n                               </div>` :\n                               comp.type === 'accordion' ?\n                               (() => {\n                                   const items = comp.items || [{title:'',content:''}];\n                                   return `<div>${items.map((it,i) => `\n                                   <div style=\"margin-bottom:0.6rem;padding:0.7rem;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.03);border-radius:8px;border: 1px solid var(--cmd-border);\">\n                                       <label style=\"display:block;font-size:0.75rem;color:var(--cmd-text-muted);margin-bottom:0.2rem;\">Section ${i+1} Title</label>\n                                       <input class=\"cmd-input block-field-input\" style=\"width:100%;margin-bottom:0.4rem;\" data-index=\"${index}\" data-field=\"items.${i}.title\" value=\"${it.title||''}\">\n                                       <label style=\"display:block;font-size:0.75rem;color:var(--cmd-text-muted);margin-bottom:0.2rem;\">Section ${i+1} Content</label>\n                                       ${getFormattingToolbarMarkup(index, `items.${i}.content`)}\n                                       <div class=\"glass-input block-field-input\" contenteditable=\"true\" style=\"width:100%;font-family:var(--font-sans);font-size:0.82rem;min-height:3.5rem;overflow-y:auto;\" data-index=\"${index}\" data-field=\"items.${i}.content\" placeholder=\"Enter accordion content...\">${it.content||''}</div>\n                                   </div>`).join('')}</div>`;\n                               })() :\n                               comp.type === 'matching' ?\n                               (() => {\n                                   const pairs = comp.pairs || [{left:'',right:''}];\n                                   return `<div>${pairs.map((p,i) => `\n                                   <div style=\"display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:0.4rem;margin-bottom:0.5rem;align-items:center;\">\n                                       <input class=\"cmd-input block-field-input\" style=\"width:100%;font-size:0.82rem;\" placeholder=\"Left (concept)\" data-index=\"${index}\" data-field=\"pairs.${i}.left\" value=\"${p.left||''}\">\n                                       <input class=\"cmd-input block-field-input\" style=\"width:100%;font-size:0.82rem;\" placeholder=\"Right (match)\" data-index=\"${index}\" data-field=\"pairs.${i}.right\" value=\"${p.right||''}\">\n                                   </div>`).join('')}</div>`;\n                               })() :\n                               `<div>\n                                   ${getFormattingToolbarMarkup(index, 'content')}\n                                   <div class=\"glass-input block-content-textarea\" contenteditable=\"true\" data-index=\"${index}\" style=\"width: 100%; font-family: var(--font-sans); line-height: 1.5; min-height: ${comp.type === 'text' ? '9rem' : '4.5rem'}; overflow-y: auto;\" placeholder=\"Enter ${comp.type} content...\">${comp.content || ''}</div>\n                               </div>`\n                            }\n                        </div>\n                    `;\n                    \n                    blockCard.addEventListener('click', (e) => {\n                        if (['INPUT', 'TEXTAREA', 'BUTTON', 'SELECT', 'OPTION'].includes(e.target.tagName) || e.target.contentEditable === 'true' || e.target.closest('[contenteditable=\"true\"]')) {\n                            return;\n                        }\n                        syncTextareas();\n                        activeInsertIndex = index;\n                        insertPosSelect.value = index.toString();\n                        highlightActiveInsertTarget();\n                    });\n                    \n                    compContainer.appendChild(blockCard);\n                });\n                \n                updateInsertPosDropdown();\n                highlightActiveInsertTarget();\n            }\n\n            window.moveBlock = (index, dir) => {\n                syncTextareas();\n                const targetIndex = index + dir;\n                if (targetIndex >= 0 && targetIndex < currentComponents.length) {\n                    const temp = currentComponents[index];\n                    currentComponents[index] = currentComponents[targetIndex];\n                    currentComponents[targetIndex] = temp;\n                    \n                    if (activeInsertIndex === index) {\n                        activeInsertIndex = targetIndex;\n                    } else if (activeInsertIndex === targetIndex) {\n                        activeInsertIndex = index;\n                    }\n                    \n                    renderBuilderComponents();\n                }\n            };\n            \n            window.deleteBlock = (index) => {\n                syncTextareas();\n                currentComponents.splice(index, 1);\n                if (activeInsertIndex === index) {\n                    activeInsertIndex = -1;\n                } else if (activeInsertIndex > index) {\n                    activeInsertIndex--;\n                }\n                renderBuilderComponents();\n            };\n            \n            function syncTextareas() {\n                window.syncTextareasGlobal = syncTextareas;\n                const textareas = document.querySelectorAll('.block-content-textarea');\n                textareas.forEach(ta => {\n                    const index = parseInt(ta.getAttribute('data-index'));\n                    if (currentComponents[index]) {\n                        const val = (ta.tagName === 'DIV' || ta.contentEditable === 'true') ? ta.innerHTML : ta.value;\n                        currentComponents[index].content = val;\n                    }\n                });\n                \n                const colorSelects = document.querySelectorAll('.block-color-select');\n                colorSelects.forEach(select => {\n                    const index = parseInt(select.getAttribute('data-index'));\n                    if (currentComponents[index]) {\n                        currentComponents[index].color = select.value;\n                    }\n                });\n                \n                const bgSelects = document.querySelectorAll('.block-bg-select');\n                bgSelects.forEach(select => {\n                    const index = parseInt(select.getAttribute('data-index'));\n                    if (currentComponents[index]) {\n                        currentComponents[index].bg = select.value;\n                    }\n                });\n\n                const fontSelects = document.querySelectorAll('.block-font-select');\n                fontSelects.forEach(select => {\n                    const index = parseInt(select.getAttribute('data-index'));\n                    if (currentComponents[index]) {\n                        currentComponents[index].font = select.value;\n                    }\n                });\n                \n                const emojiInputs = document.querySelectorAll('.block-emoji-input');\n                emojiInputs.forEach(input => {\n                    const index = parseInt(input.getAttribute('data-index'));\n                    if (currentComponents[index]) {\n                        currentComponents[index].emoji = input.value;\n                    }\n                });\n                \n                const titleInputs = document.querySelectorAll('.block-title-input');\n                titleInputs.forEach(input => {\n                    const index = parseInt(input.getAttribute('data-index'));\n                    if (currentComponents[index]) {\n                        currentComponents[index].title = input.value;\n                    }\n                });\n\n                const fieldInputs = document.querySelectorAll('.block-field-input');\n                fieldInputs.forEach(input => {\n                    const index = parseInt(input.getAttribute('data-index'));\n                    const field = input.getAttribute('data-field');\n                    if (!field || !currentComponents[index]) return;\n                    const parts = field.split('.');\n                    let obj = currentComponents[index];\n                    for (let i = 0; i < parts.length - 1; i++) {\n                        const key = isNaN(parts[i]) ? parts[i] : parseInt(parts[i]);\n                        if (obj[key] === undefined || obj[key] === null) {\n                            obj[key] = isNaN(parts[i+1]) ? {} : [];\n                        }\n                        obj = obj[key];\n                    }\n                    const lastKey = isNaN(parts[parts.length-1]) ? parts[parts.length-1] : parseInt(parts[parts.length-1]);\n                    const val = (input.tagName === 'DIV' || input.contentEditable === 'true') ? input.innerHTML : input.value;\n                    obj[lastKey] = val;\n                });\n            }\n            \n            btnAddComp.addEventListener('click', () => {\n                syncTextareas();\n                const type = addTypeSelect.value;\n                let newComp;\n                if (type === 'flip_card') {\n                    newComp = { type: 'flip_card', front: '', back: '', icon: '💡', color: 'default', bg: 'none' };\n                } else if (type === 'multiple_choice') {\n                    newComp = { type: 'multiple_choice', question: '', options: ['', '', '', ''], correct_index: 0, explanation: '', color: 'default', bg: 'none' };\n                } else if (type === 'true_false') {\n                    newComp = { type: 'true_false', statement: '', correct: true, explanation: '', color: 'default', bg: 'none' };\n                } else if (type === 'accordion') {\n                    newComp = { type: 'accordion', items: [{title: '', content: ''}, {title: '', content: ''}], color: 'default', bg: 'none' };\n                } else if (type === 'matching') {\n                    newComp = { type: 'matching', pairs: [{left: '', right: ''}, {left: '', right: ''}, {left: '', right: ''}], color: 'default', bg: 'none' };\n                } else if (type === 'essay') {\n                    newComp = {\n                        type: 'essay',\n                        content: '',\n                        color: 'default',\n                        bg:
